title: Frontend Engineer
description:
**About Intric**
 At Intric, our mission is to make generative AI easy, open, and secure — so that more organizations can benefit from its full potential.
   

  

 Our collaborative web platform is already trusted within the Swedish public sector and by organizations where data sovereignty and security are essential. We are now entering a pivotal growth phase and expanding across Europe.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to join early, take ownership, and help shape the future of secure AI infrastructure.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Frontend Engineer, you will lead the development of a fast, accessible, and scalable web experience. You will build new features, refine architecture, and continuously improve performance and usability with the end user in focus.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with backend engineers, product designers, and business stakeholders to evolve the platform across both desktop and mobile. This role combines hands-on coding with architectural thinking and product impact.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain high-quality, scalable frontend features
* Improve performance, accessibility, and overall user experience
* Contribute to architectural decisions and frontend best practices
* Collaborate cross-functionally with product and engineering teams
* Optimize state management, caching, and data flows
* Continuously improve developer workflows and tooling


**Our Tech Stack**
* Node.js
* TypeScript
* HTML / CSS
* Svelte / SvelteKit
* Tailwind CSS
* Docker
* Git
* Jira


**Who You Are**
 You care deeply about building reliable, maintainable, and user-friendly products.
   

  

 You:
   

  

* Have 3–5+ years of frontend engineering experience
* Have a strong understanding of core web technologies (HTML/DOM, HTTP, JavaScript/TypeScript)
* Have experience building and scaling modern web applications
* Are comfortable working with state management and caching strategies
* Write efficient, accessible, and maintainable code
* Collaborate effectively and communicate clearly across teams
* Have a degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience


**Must-Haves**
* Solid experience with modern JavaScript frameworks
* Strong understanding of frontend architecture and performance optimization
* Experience working in product-focused, collaborative environments
* Ability to take ownership of features from idea to production
* Professional fluency in English


**Bonus**
* Experience with Svelte or SvelteKit
* Experience with Tailwind CSS
* Familiarity with developer tooling and internal workflow optimization


**Why Join Intric**
* Build technology with real societal impact
* Join at a pivotal growth stage and influence both product and technical direction
* Work in a trust-based, flexible environment with high ownership
* Be part of a fast-moving team that values pragmatic decisions over rigid frameworks
* Shape the frontend foundation of a secure AI platform scaling across Europe


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary and stock options
* 25 days of paid vacation
* Wellness allowance
* Rapid career development in a fast-growing AI company


**Culture at Intric**
 At Intric, we build secure AI solutions for organizations that cannot afford to get it wrong. We operate in environments where quality, responsibility, and long-term trust are essential.
   

  

 We value ownership and high standards. You are expected to take initiative, think critically, and contribute beyond your immediate scope when needed. Collaboration is key, but so is independent execution.
   

  

 We move fast, but we prioritize doing things properly. As we expand across Europe, every team member plays a role in shaping both the product and the culture.

title: Software Developer
description:
*BROMMA is a division of Kalmar, operating under its own brand. BROMMA has been the leading manufacturer of crane spreaders ever since its formation in the 1960s. Today we have, by far, the highest market share of the world’s spreader suppliers. Today, our spreaders are currently in use in 99 of the top-100 ports worldwide.*
*BROMMA sales and service network has a wide-reaching footprint. We are present with own sales offices on all continents, and with an extensive network of agents, we are able to support customers in every country in the world.*
*More information about BROMMA can be found on www.bromma.com*
**Join us and take your career to the next level**
 We are looking for a Software Developer to join our innovative team in Kista and help steer the digitalization of global cargo handling. At Bromma, you’ll work on the complete diagnostic lifecycle, developing the telematic software that serves as the backbone of our digital strategy. If you’re a developer who enjoys solving complex problems in a truly international atmosphere, Bromma offers the perfect space to grow your career and your craft. In this role you will report to our Manager for R&D Cloud and Diagnostics.
   

  

**What Are Your Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain Bromma’s diagnostic and cloud platforms, working on a codebase that is now fully managed and developed in-house.
* Work across the full diagnostic lifecycle, building software for onboard telematics, machine-level diagnostics, and cloud-based prognostics.
* Contribute to full-stack development projects, ranging from handling raw machine data to building out functional user interfaces.
* Collaborate within the R&D Cloud and Diagnostics team, coordinating with internal stakeholders and external vendors to deliver technical solutions.
* Implement Bromma’s digital roadmap, focusing on the practical application of software to improve cargo handling operations.
* Translate technical requirements into reliable, scalable code that supports the performance and monitoring of heavy machinery globally.


**What We Offer You**
*"Respect is how we work — across departments, across borders, across job titles. "*
* Rewards that truly count: We create opportunities for growth through diverse experiences and uphold fair, gender-neutral pay, fostering a culture built on equity, empowerment, and continuous development. We also offer a comprehensive rewards package which combines flexibility, wellness, and recognition.
* Safety that moves us forward: Build your career with a company rooted in safety since the 1940s, ensuring stability and an environment that empowers you to speak and be heard.
* Purpose that drives change: You'll contribute to solutions that transform global trade, creating environmental and operational innovations. You'll be in the driver's seat of ideas, developing digital technologies that set industry standards and position us as the forerunner.
* People who move together: You'll collaborate with people who build lasting relationships through global expertise, connections, and a commitment to sustainability.


 Become part of our global network of 5,300 professionals across 120+ countries, where your work drives innovation, sustainability, and meaningful impact around the world.
   

  

**What You Bring To The Role**
* Experience with AWS and DevOps practices, including working with PostgreSQL or other relational databases.
* Practical knowledge of Spring Boot and Node.js.
* A solid understanding of Linux environments and experience coding in C++ or Java.
* Experience in cloud-backed development with an interest in how software interacts with hardware.
* A B.Sc. degree in a relevant field or equivalent professional work experience.
* Fluency in English (written and spoken); proficiency in Swedish is considered an asset.


**Ready to elevate your career? Apply today!**
**Join us and take the next step in your career journey with Bromma!** 
 As the interviews may begin before the closing date, we encourage early applications. Please submit your CV in English.
   

  

 We support hybrid work arrangements, offering flexibility to balance office and remote work but don’t provide relocation support.
   

  

**For further information** 
 please contact Joel Ek Kanslätt, Manager for R&D Cloud and Diagnostics by phone +46 70 200 04 58 or e-mail: joel.ek.kanslatt@bromma.com.
   

  

 Closing Date: 8/3/2026
   

  

 #Bromma
   

  

*Bromma is part of Kalmar.*
**About Kalmar**
*Kalmar (Nasdaq Helsinki: KALMAR) is moving goods in critical supply chains around the world, with the vision to be the forerunner in sustainable material handling equipment and services. The company offers a wide range of industry shaping heavy material handling equipment and services to ports and terminals, distribution centres, manufacturing and heavy logistics. Headquartered in Helsinki, Finland, Kalmar operates globally in over 120 countries and employs approximately 5,300 people. In 2025, the company's sales totalled approximately EUR 1.7 billion. www.kalmarglobal.com*

title: Software Engineer - Full Stack
description:
Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  





 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world. Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your community, and to the world.
   

  





 Progress starts with you.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 At Tink, we deliver open banking solutions as a part of Visa. We’re creating the foundations that a new world of finance will be built on. By constantly challenging ourselves to go further and do better, we’re developing the ground-breaking services that businesses will use, to revolutionize the way millions of people manage their money. The world of financial services is changing fast, and we will continue to be at the forefront of it.
   

  





 Tink is building an open banking platform that enables banks, fintechs and startups to develop data-driven financial services. Through one API, Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe. Our solutions are ready-to-go products, each developed to solve specific problems and bring value to both businesses and their customers.
   

  





 We are looking for talented, curious, and energetic Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale.  As a Visa Software Engineer, you will be an integral part of a cross-functional development team inventing, designing, building, and testing software products that reach a truly global customer base. While building components of cutting-edge payment technology, you will get to see your efforts shaping the digital future of monetary transactions.
   

  





 The Work itself:
   

  




* Design frontend and backend systems while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate cross-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions for multiple Visa technical offerings
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, value added service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads
* Develop robust and scalable products intended for a myriad of customers including end-user merchants, b2b, and business to government solutions
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services, Transaction Platforms, Real-Time Payments
* Opportunities to make a difference on a global or local scale through mentorship and continued learning opportunities



 Essential Functions:
   

  




* Works under close guidance to implement basic enhancements and modifications to existing software that complies with design specifications and meets security best practices.
* Learns about automations that improve effectiveness and efficiency of systems and tools.
* Engages with team members to receive feedback on code.
* Follows instructions from manager to implement improvements to code, processes, and designs with and understands customer/business objectives.
* Leverage Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies to optimize code performance, enhance system automation, and deliver smarter solutions that meet evolving business and user needs.



 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

 Basic Qualifications:
   

  




* Bachelor's degree, OR relevant work experience



 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  




* Technical Expertise: Experience developing front-end code (e.g., Angular, React) and APIs for software applications (Node.js or Golang).
* Knowledge of database software for maintaining and manipulating data. Understanding of systems integration processes and data structures for efficient operations.
* Growth & Innovation Mindset: Curiosity and passion for technology, comfort in challenging traditional solutions, and a drive to learn modern tools like Kubernetes, and Docker.
* Problem-Solving: Ability to approach problems logically and creatively, asking questions and seeking solutions.
* Collaboration: Willingness to work in a team, share ideas, and learn from peers and mentors.
* Adaptability: Openness to feedback, learning new technologies, and adapting to changing priorities.


**Additional Information**

 Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Software Engineer (IaaS)
description:
Everyone's story matters. Come shape your story with us at Riverty.
   

  

**But where does that take you?**
 To one of our 30 hybrid workspaces – designed for exchanging ideas, learning from others, and shaping the way we work. An international community of over 4,000 people, representing almost 80 nationalities across 11 countries. United by one mission: Combining empathy, advanced technology and data-driven insights to keep people and businesses in flow. With payments made for them. So that they don't have to worry about it.
   

  

**And there's more:** 
 We are part of the family-owned Bertelsmann group. Established. Corporate. In a fast-paced industry. We enable flexible payments in various industries, simplifying the financial management of known brands and helping people repay debt to build financial confidence. In short: shaping FinTech.
   

  

**We are looking for**
**Software Engineer**
**to join our team at our location in Stockholm**
**(Y)our Mission:**
 Our solutions contribute to flexible and customer-friendly payment alternatives. We allow consumers to choose when and how they want to pay, guaranteeing merchants a steady and predictable cash flow. Our products make us proud, but not content, and we have high ambitions for our existing and upcoming products. We’re now modernizing and strengthening one of our key products with renewed focus in the Nordics — backed by the strength of a global group, but with the energy and ownership of a startup. You’ll join a newly formed product & tech team, helping shape how we work and how we grow as we double down on building sustainable, human-centric FinTech solutions.
   

  

**Your key responsibilities:**
* In this role, you will work as a full-stack engineer, primarily focusing on backend tasks and having smaller front-end responsibilities. You will join one of our products, and your daily tasks will be:
* Design, develop, test, and ship robust, maintainable, and readable software, applications, APIs, and other workflows.
* Attend regular scrum ceremonies as a member of an agile cross-functional team.
* Analyze, discuss and implement business requirements while maintaining good documentation of the systems and components you create.
* Adopt, implement, and provide feedback on organizational and industry standards and practices that will positively impact on our engineering culture.


  

  

**What will help you to succeed in the role:**
* A university degree in the IT field
* Hands-on experience with C# and the .NET framework.
* Experience in frontend development with any modern JavaScript framework (e.g., Angular).
* Some experience in developing, shipping, and maintaining cloud-based applications.
* A good understanding of RESTful APIs.
* Familiarity with microservices and distributed architecture is a plus.
* Experience with relational databases, preferably SQL Server.
* Knowledge of cloud development and experience with Azure is a bonus.
* Written and spoken English proficiency to communicate and collaborate with our international team.


**About the technologies we use:**
 Our teams have autonomy regarding tech choices. The example below will give you some insights, and we look forward to discussing this further.
   

  

 All solutions developed cloud-native targeting Azure - Infrastructure defined using Terraform - Services deployed to Kubernetes clusters by default - A growing microservice ecosystem with event-based integration - Using latest .NET Core - RESTful API design - Single-page frontend apps served by CDN - Frontend tech using TypeScript, often Angular or standard Web Components (Stencil) - Automated tests in each layer - Design collaboration using Figma.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer Statement
   

  

 We want to be a fair and inclusive employer. We value the diverse perspectives that a diverse workforce brings to the table. Therefore, we are actively looking for people who enrich our company through their identity, background and personal experiences, with or without a disability.
   

  

**Benefits:**
* At Riverty, you can be who you are. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment and a culture of appreciation, enriched by our employee networks.
* Prioritize your health with supported sports and leisure activities.
* Take advantage of our numerous training and development opportunities! Enhance your skills with training offered by the Bertelsmann University, language courses, or leadership training.
* Benefit from our discounts on Bertelsmann products and financial incentives.
* With our diverse work models, you can tailor your work to your preferences. Take advantage of mobile office, flexible working hours, and part-time models.

title: Software Engineer – Marketplace
description:
**Introducing evroc**
 At evroc, we are building a secure, sovereign, and sustainable hyperscale cloud to reimagine the digital future of Europe. By joining our company, you have an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of next-generation cloud services. We are seeking intellectually curious and highly motivated team members who are ready to embrace the thrilling challenge of building the first European owned hyperscale cloud.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Job type:** 
 Permanent position
   

  

**Join the Pioneers**
 We’re looking for a Software Engineer to help build evroc’s Marketplace, the platform that enables third-party providers to integrate, distribute, and operate services directly within evroc’s cloud. Think of it as the foundation of an app-store ecosystem for cloud infrastructure, built with security, scalability, and European sovereignty at its core.
   

  

 This is a greenfield opportunity where you’ll work on the core control plane, APIs, and extension models that power the Marketplace. You’ll play a key role in shaping how integrations are built, secured, operated, and scaled across evroc’s cloud services.
   

  

**What You’ll Tackle**
* Design and build control-plane services in Golang for provisioning, lifecycle management, and access control.
* Define and evolve internal and external API contracts with a strong focus on versioning and backward compatibility.
* Build secure and extensible integration and plugin models for third-party services.
* Collaborate with product, platform, and billing teams on usage tracking, licensing, and monetization flows.
* Architect multitenant systems with strong isolation, quotas, rate-limiting, and fine-grained authorization.
* Work closely with evroc’s platform and infrastructure teams to ensure seamless integration across evroc’s cloud services.
* Contribute to high engineering standards around code quality, documentation, observability, and operability.
* Design and build new Marketplace functionality from scratch, from early architecture decisions to production-ready services.
* Work with evroc partners to define Marketplace requirements.


**Skills We Value**
* Strong production experience with Golang.
* Deep understanding of API design, control-plane architectures, and service-oriented systems.
* Experience working with cloud platforms and cloud-native architectures.
* Solid background in multitenancy, authentication/authorization, and secure system design.
* Experience designing modular, extensible systems and integration frameworks.
* Strong understanding of distributed systems, including databases, caching, and messaging.
* Experience with Kubernetes and infrastructure tooling is a plus.
* Experience with marketplaces, billing, or usage-based systems is a plus.


**Why Join evroc?**
 We offer a competitive salary and an equity package to attract the best. Whether it’s the cosmopolitan allure of London, the vibrant Stockholm, or the Mediterranean charm of Sophia Antipolis, you’re poised for an inspiring work environment and a captivating local culture!
   

  

 At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background - ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture - is celebrated.
   

  

 Applicants must possess a valid work permit.

title: Senior React Developer
description:
Tech with a Human Touch
 



  





 ANIMARUM söker en senior frontendutvecklare för uppdrag hos en av våra kunder inom iGaming.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som har:** 



* Minst 6–8 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling.
* Stark erfarenhet av React, Redux och TypeScript.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med REST API:er och microservices-arkitektur.
* God förståelse för AWS, Azure eller GCP och hur applikationer byggs och integreras i molnmiljö.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD och moderna utvecklingsprocesser.
* Kunskap inom prestandaoptimering, säkerhet och tillgänglighet i webbapplikationer.
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska.
* Förmåga att ta ansvar för helheten i tekniska leveranser.



  





 Varför ANIMARUM
 



 På ANIMARUM handlar det inte bara om jobbet – det handlar om att vara en del av ett team där alla stöttar varandra. Vi tror på
 







 Ett människocentrerat förhållningssätt
 



 Vi är ett team som verkligen bryr oss om varandra och strävar efter att skapa en arbetsplats där alla kan växa och lyckas.
 







 Möjligheter att växa
 



 Oavsett om du just påbörjat din karriär eller är en erfaren expert erbjuder vi möjligheter att fortsätta lära och utvecklas.
 







 Balans mellan arbete och fritid
 



 Vi förstår att livet inte bara handlar om arbete. Vi stöttar dig i att hitta den perfekta balansen mellan karriär och privatliv.
 







 Förmåner som gör livet enklare
 



 På ANIMARUM vill vi att våra medarbetare ska blomstra – inte bara på jobbet, utan i livet. Därför erbjuder vi en rad förmåner som gör livet lite enklare:
 







 Friskvårdsbidrag
 



 Stärk ditt välmående med vårt friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 SEK varje år. Oavsett om det gäller gymkort, massage eller något annat som får dig att må bra – det är ditt att använda!
 







 Företagsbil eller cykel
 



 Res med stil med möjlighet till företagsbil eller företagscykel – perfekt för din dagliga pendling eller helgäventyr.
 







 Bruttolöneavdrag
 



 Vi erbjuder bruttolöneavdrag så att du kan göra smarta ekonomiska val för din framtid.
 







 SL-kort
 



 Vi gör pendlingen enkel med ett SL-kort, så du slipper tänka på biljetter och kan fokusera på att komma dit du behöver.
 







 Att få livet att fungera
 



 Vi vet att det kan vara svårt att balansera arbete och privatliv, därför samarbetar vi med företag som erbjuder rabatterade tjänster för ANIMARUM-anställda, inklusive: barnomsorg, städtjänster och läxhjälp. Allt för att göra ditt liv lite mindre stressigt.
 







 Att ge tillbaka till samhället
 



 Vi tror på kraften i att göra gott. Därför får våra medarbetare varje år möjlighet att donera ett bestämt belopp till en välgörenhet de själva väljer. Oavsett om det handlar om att stötta utbildning, miljön eller människor i behov, ger vi vårt team möjlighet att bidra till det de brinner för.
 







 Konkurrenskraftiga löner och optionsprogram
 



 Vi vet att vår största tillgång är vårt fantastiska team, och vi tycker att det ska återspeglas i lönekuvertet! Därför erbjuder vi flera flexibla och konkurrenskraftiga lönepaket för att passa alla:
 







 Oavsett vilket paket du väljer är vi engagerade i att säkerställa att du blir rättvist belönad och att du har friheten att forma din egen inkomst.

title: Developer - React Native, Stockholm
description:
**About Elite Prospects** 




  





 Elite Prospects is the world’s leading hockey platform and the central hub connecting fans, players, agents, scouts, and executives. As the true gateway to hockey, we create opportunities for players while serving as the global community destination for everything related to the game.
 



 With more than thirty thousand paying subscribers, over five hundred thousand registered members, and six million unique monthly visitors, Elite Prospects continues to cement its role as the digital heartbeat of hockey. We are now looking for a UI/UX Designer who wants to help shape the future of hockey technology.
 



  





 We are looking for an experienced React native developer to join our Product and Tech team.
 



  





 You’ll be a key addition to our special teams, driving the play, setting up scoring chances, and helping the entire lineup perform at its peak.
 



  





 We aim to become a world-class engineering team that combines speed with excellence, that other divisions can rely on completely, and that pushes the boundaries of what’s possible in our product. It is a tight roster where collaboration, creativity, and strong passing plays are part of our daily game.
 



  





 We are primarily based in Malmö and Stockholm and we are looking for someone to work on-site with us.
 



  





**What You Will Work On** 




  





 Right now we are reshaping our web and app experience with the ambition to become the “LinkedIn of Hockey.” This means strengthening network effects and delivering a personalized, persona-driven experience that adapts onboarding, features, and workflows to the unique needs of players, professionals, organizations and fans.
 



  





 You will help us create experiences that keep the hockey world informed, inspired, and always one stride ahead.
 



  





**Your Player Type** 




  




* Pragmatic and proactive
* React native, React\*, Nextjs\*, Graphql
* Strong TypeScript skills
* Ability to write clean, testable, well-structured code
* Understanding of performance implications and async behavior
* Deep understanding of CSS architecture
* Can work independently and break down complex tasks
* Can mentor others and give/receive feedback



  





**Who You Are** 




  




* At least 5 years of qualified work experience after completing your post secondary education
* Fluent in English. Swedish fluency is a bonus
* A hockey or sports interest is very welcome
* A genuine passion for software development and modern technology
* Someone who keeps up with the latest trends and learns new things easily
* Enjoy working with agile development methods
* As a person, we believe you:
* Take initiative and help drive the process forward when we are under pressure in the box
* Are a true team player who prioritizes collective success over individual stats



  





**Practical Information** 




  





 This is a full time role based at our office in central Stockholm at Gamla brogatan 11.
 



  





 We want you to be on site at least four days per week. Trust us, once you get to know the team you will want to be there. Working together face to face makes everything more fun and helps us level up faster.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




  




* The chance to work on a very exciting, fast growing product that we fully believe in
* A skilled and friendly team that values collaboration, shared success, and having fun together
* A welcoming and inclusive culture



  





**Some examples of what we do as a team** 




  




* An annual conference where we gather every colleague from across more than three continents
* A strong focus on competence development including monthly learning sessions
* Frequent after work activities and fun games at the office



  





 If you want to join a team that builds the future of hockey technology and enjoy doing it, then Elite Prospects is ready to take the ice with you.

title: Utvecklare Dynamics 365 F&O
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Om oss**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande konsult- och managementbolag inom digital transformation med tusentals medarbetare i Norden och Europa. Vi har flera år i rad utsetts till en av “Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser” av Great Place to Work och rankas av Gartner som ett av de fem främsta företagen inom digital transformation.
   

  

 Bland annat hjälper vi företag att effektivisera och automatisera sina affärsprocesser, från ekonomi och försäljning till produktion, drift och analys. Vi är stolta över att ha byggt ett starkt erbjudande inom ERP och Business Platforms, där vi erbjuder allt från rådgivning och implementation till långsiktig förvaltning.
   

  

 Vi är på tillväxtresa! Som en del i vår tillväxt vill vi stärka vårt team inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 ERP. Här får du vara med och leverera affärssystemslösningar som verkligen gör skillnad — från rådgivning och systemutveckling till implementering och långsiktig förvaltning. Nu söker vi en
 **Utvecklare Dynamics 365 F&O** 
 som vill vara med och skapa affärsvärde på riktigt.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som utvecklare i Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations kommer du att ansvara för att utveckla och integrera affärslösningar för kunder inom olika branscher. Du arbetar nära verksamhet och arkitekter för att förverkliga kundernas visioner och för att koppla samman Dynamics 365 F&O med andra system för att säkra effektiva och sömlösa affärsflöden, från första idé till färdig lösning.
   

  

**Mer konkret…**
 …kommer du att vara involverad i flera spännande projekt där du bland annat arbetar med:
   

  

* Utveckling och anpassning av funktionalitet i Dynamics 365 F&O med X++ och C#.
* Skapande och hantering av integrationer, t.ex. Azure Integration Services, för att koppla Dynamics med externa system.
* Design och hantering av integrationer (t.ex. Azure Integration Services och REST-API:er) för koppling mellan Dynamics och externa system.
* Delta i förstudier och workshops med kunder för att fånga krav och bidra till lösningsdesign.
* Testning och validering av utvecklade lösningar för att säkerställa att de möter både tekniska och verksamhetsmässiga krav.


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har minst 3 års erfarenhet som utvecklare med Dynamics 365 F&O.
* Väl insatt och bekväm med X++, C# och Azure Integration Services.
* Har erfarenhet av integrationer mellan Dynamics 365 F&O och andra system — gärna via REST API.
* Har ett starkt intresse för teknisk utveckling och för att skapa lösningar som effektiviserar affärsprocesser.


**Varför Sopra Steria?**
 Hos oss får du arbeta i en inkluderande och utvecklande miljö med några av branschens främsta experter. Vi erbjuder spännande kunduppdrag, kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och goda karriärmöjligheter – i ett bolag där människan alltid står i centrum.
   

  

 Hos Sopra Steria får du mer än ett jobb, du får en karriärresa.
   

  

* Bli en del av ett toppteam: Arbeta sida vid sida med några av marknadens mest erfarna experter inom affärssystem och integration.
* Utvecklas på riktigt: Vi satsar stort på kompetensutveckling, certifieringar och personlig utveckling.
* Jobba med projekt som utmanar: Våra kunder spänner över många branscher och våra uppdrag varierar från komplexa transformationer till nyskapande lösningar på marknadens modernaste plattformar.
* Kultur som folk faktiskt trivs i: Vi är stolta över en arbetsmiljö där kollegor stöttar varandra, idéer välkomnas och där det är roligt att gå till jobbet.


**Ytterligare information**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande internationellt konsultbolag inom digital transformation. Vi bygger samhället genom designdriven innovation, teknisk utveckling med kunskap om marknadens ledande plattformar och driftlösningar (managed services). Med modern teknologi och en gedigen affärsförståelse är vi en helhetspartner för våra kunder och deras digitala transformationsresa. Enligt Great Place To Work är vi en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser, vi har tilldelats utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad och Gartner har listat oss som ett topp 5 bolag inom digital transformation.

Vi bygger samhället genom designdriven innovation, teknisk utveckling med kunskap om marknadens ledande plattformar och driftlösningar (managed services). title: Lead Software Engineer – Electronic Warfare (m/f/d)
description:
Permanent employee, Full-time
   

  

* Stockholm


**About Us**
 STARK is a defence technology company redefining how autonomous and electronic warfare systems are engineered and deployed. We design, build, and operationalise high-performance EW and unmanned systems that provide NATO forces with decisive advantages in contested electromagnetic environments. Our work is grounded in precision, responsibility, and uncompromising engineering discipline.
   

  

 Your mission
   

  

 As the Lead C2 EW engineer, you will serve as the technical authority, collaborating closely with the chief EW engineer to translate complex RF physics into high-level command and control functionalities. You will be the technical authority responsible for integrating advanced EW capabilities into our Minerva C2 stack, evolving our software architecture to handle sensor fusion and advanced data visualisation. This is a system-level development role where you will expand and lead a focused team of engineers to help us dominate the electromagnetic spectrum.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Act as the lead architect and developer for EW Command and control, ensuring seamless Integration between EW subsystem and the command stack.
* Lead the design and development of both Typescript based UX integration and potentially High Performance C++ data post-processing.
* Focusing on taking our advanced EW efforts to the Minerva command and control ecosystem, enabling drone operators the use of an expanding suite of EW capabilities.
* Develop algorithms for sensor fusion to provide unified situational awareness and design advanced data visualisation tools for complex RF telemetry.
* Act as the technical bridge between the EW core system and our command and control system, ensuring constraints and abilities are accurately reflected in the user model.
* Take ownership of the EW software C2 roadmap and eventually recruit, mentor, and lead a high-performing team.
* Define rigorous integration testing protocols to ensure system reliability in highly contested, real-world EW environments.


**Qualifications**
* Expert-level proficiency in modern software development, likely including but not limited to TypeScript and C++.
* A solid understanding of system-level architecture, including backend and frontend development. Including performance and memory management tradeoffs for complex
* Proven experience in complex system-level development (this is more critical than prior EW-specific experience, though the latter is a plus).
* A strong interest and understanding visualizing & manipulating complex data sets
* The ability to communicate structured technical visions to stakeholders, combined with the desire to both lead an effective engineering team and individually contribute to the codebase.


 Relevant Backgrounds
   

  

* Engineers who have moved back and forth between systems/theory-intensive roles and heavy software systems development.
* Experience with C2 stacks, tactical data links, or large-scale autonomous system orchestration.
* Background in Radar, EW-sensors, Software Defined Radio (SDR), or complex wave propagation.
* Experience with sensor fusion, Fourier methods, signal processing, or translating physical phenomena into usable information.


 Nice-to-Have / Bonus Skills
   

  

* A strong understanding of RF or Physics, paired with professional software engineering experience. You should get comfortable speaking both RF and Code.
* Prior experience with defense command and control software.
* Hands-on experience with jamming theory, threat-driven RF effects, or EW tactics.
* Familiarity with advanced data visualisation frameworks for real-time telemetry.
* A strong desire to learn the specifics of the EW domain on the job while applying your existing systems expertise.


 Apply for this job
   

  

**About Us**
**LEGAL DISCLAIMER**
 We are an equal-opportunity employer committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. Due to the nature of our work in the defense sector, candidates must be eligible to obtain and maintain the appropriate security clearance required for the position.
   

  

 Apply for this job
   

  

 We are looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Embedded Developer
description:
**About Piab Group** 
 :
 



 At Piab Group we improve our customers' productivity, sustainability, and safety through evolving industrial automation and have done so since 1951. We believe in an automated world where no resources are wasted, and no humans are injured. With annual sales of ~3 billion SEK and more than 1400 employees, Piab is a global organization, serving customers in more than 100 countries from a vast network of subsidiaries and channel partners. Since 2018, Piab Group has been owned by Patricia Industries, part of Investor AB.
 



 Piab serves a wide range of industries, including e-commerce logistics, food and beverage, pharmaceuticals, and automotive, providing innovative vacuum automation solutions tailored to each sector.
 



  





**Job Mission:** 




 As an Embedded Developer at Piab, you will play a key role in designing, implementing, and maintaining embedded software solutions that drive our innovative automation products. Your expertise will ensure robust hardware/software integration, support continuous improvement, and help deliver high-quality solutions that enhance productivity and safety for our global customers.
 



  





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:** 



* Design, implement, and maintain embedded software for Cortex-M based products.
* Develop and maintain support tools (mainly in Python) to improve development and testing workflows.
* Integrate and validate communication protocols (BLE, IO-Link, PROFINET, and other industrial buses).
* Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and sprint planning (using Jira and Git).
* Collaborate with hardware engineers to ensure seamless HW/SW integration.
* Debug and resolve issues at both hardware and software levels.
* Implement and tune control algorithms as required by product specifications.
* Document software design, architecture, and user guides in English.
* Contribute to continuous improvement of development processes and toolchains.
* Support production and field teams with troubleshooting and technical expertise.
* Ensure compliance with relevant industry standards and best practices.



  





**REQUIREMENTS:** 



* Proficient in Embedded C programming (focus on Cortex-M architectures)
* RTOS experience (FreeRTOS, now renamed, and similar real-time operating systems)
* Version control with Git
* Task and issue tracking with Jira
* Debugging and troubleshooting embedded systems
* Hardware/software integration and testing
* Familiarity with electronics schematics and basic hardware debugging
* Fluent in English (spoken and written); Swedish is a plus
* Ability to work in cross-functional, multicultural teams
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Attention to detail and quality focus
* Ability to document code and technical solutions clearly
* Adaptability to new technologies and tools
* Collaborative team player
* Proactive and self-driven
* Curious and eager to learn
* Structured and organized
* Communicative and open-minded
* Resilient under pressure
* Customer- and solution-oriented mindset



  





**PREFERRED SKILLS:** 



* Python scripting for support tool development
* BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) protocol stack integration
* IO-Link communication
* Ethernet-based industrial buses (e.g., PROFINET)



  





**You can expect the following with us:** 



* Innovative Culture: Be part of a team that thrives on creativity and innovation.
* Global Impact: Work with a company that is a world leader in vacuum transport solutions.
* Global Presence: Piab has 25+ sales offices and over 900 partners worldwide, ensuring a vast network and global reach.
* Sustainable Vision: Contribute to an automated world, promoting safety and efficiency.
* Professional Growth: Access opportunities for continuous learning and career advancement.
* Diverse and Inclusive: Join a workplace that values diversity and fosters an inclusive environment.
* Stable employer: As part of Patricia Industries and connected to the Wallenberg family, Piab benefits from strong support and a commitment to long-term growth and sustainability.



  





**This is what our employees say about us:** 




 "At Piab, I have the chance to leave my own footprint. The low hierarchy means my ideas are heard and valued. #LoveWhereIWork"
 



  





**How to Apply:** 




 If you are passionate about innovation and want to make a difference in the world of automation, we would love to hear from you! Use the following link to upload your CV.
 



 Please be advised that a valid work permit for the country we offer the open vacancy in is required for non-EU citizens. Unfortunately, applications without a valid work permit cannot be considered.

title: ServiceNow Developer på B3 Now
description:
Är du en vass ServiceNow-utvecklare som vill vara med och forma framtiden i ett snabbväxande specialistbolag?
   

  

**B3 Now** 
 är en del av B3 Consulting Group och ett av koncernens nyare specialistbolag med fullt fokus på ServiceNow. Här arbetar du i en start-up-liknande miljö där energi, innovation och nyfikenhet präglar vardagen. Hos oss bygger du moderna applikationer, utvecklar smarta lösningar och skapar verkligt affärsvärde för våra kunder.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **ServiceNow Developer** 
 hos B3 Now blir du en viktig del av ett team av erfarna ServiceNow-specialister. Du arbetar i projekt och uppdrag med hög påverkan hos både nationella och internationella kunder inom bl.a. tillverkning, retail, finans, energi, telekom och offentlig sektor.
   

  

 Du kommer att utveckla, konfigurera och förbättra lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen. Rollen är teknisk och hands-on, med stort fokus på programmering, modern utveckling och kvalitetssäkring.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Utveckla lösningar i ServiceNow med moderna kodningsmetoder och enligt best practice.
* Arbeta med Flow Designer, IntegrationHub, Scripted REST APIs och andra automatiserings- och integrationskomponenter.
* Utveckla användargränssnitt, formulär och logik genom både low-code och custom code.
* Översätta funktionella krav till tekniska lösningar.
* Samarbeta nära kundens verksamhet för att skapa värdeskapande lösningar.
* Bidra med teknisk rådgivning i utvecklings- och arkitekturfrågor.


 Vi söker dig som är en utvecklarprofil med stark teknisk grund och intresse för både kod och affär.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har följande kvalifikationer:**
* Relevant akademisk examen eller motsvarande.
* 3–5 års erfarenhet av ServiceNow-utveckling, inklusive hands-on programmering.
* Erfarenhet av JavaScript, REST, SOAP, Scripted REST APIs samt arbete med XML/JSON.
* Erfarenhet av ServiceNow-moduler och relevanta certifieringar (ex.CAD, CIS).
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
* En analytisk, kommunikativ och lösningsorienterad approach.
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, tänka kreativt och hantera komplexa tekniska utmaningar.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Utbildningar för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.
* Kollegor med höga ambitioner och olika bakgrunder – ett inkluderande och internationellt mindset.
* En utmanande roll med stora möjligheter att växa tekniskt och professionellt.
* En kultur där vi både levererar värde till våra kunder och har roligt tillsammans.
* Möjlighet att påverka, bidra och vara med och forma framtiden för B3 Now.


**Om B3**
 På B3 Now tror vi på att kombinera yrkesstolthet med glädje. Vi drivs av att göra skillnad – både för våra kunder och våra kollegor. Vi bygger en miljö där lärande, samarbete och utveckling står i centrum, och där du får utrymme att växa i den riktning du vill.
   

  

 Vi investerar i din kompetens genom utbildningar, mentorprogram och kontinuerlig coaching. Vi tror att när du utvecklas, utvecklas även vi.
   

  

 B3 Now är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande konsultbolag. Med kontor i Sverige, Norge och Polen och internationella samarbeten hjälper vi organisationer att maximera värdet av ServiceNow genom smarta, skalbara och effektiva lösningar.
   

  

 Vi är över 1000 specialister globalt i koncernen – och växer snabbt. Hos oss får du både tryggheten av en stor aktör och närheten i ett mindre bolag där du har stort inflytande.
   

  

**Kontakt** 
 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Stefan Saarnak på +46 76 725 7059

title: Java Software Engineer
description:
***Vill du jobba som Javautvecklare för ett företag inom medtech-branschen där man skapar innovationer som bidrar till samhällsnytta?***




  





  





  





**OM FÖRETAGET** 




 Canella IT arbetar mot e-hälsomarknaden där de varit med och tagit fram flertalet system som berör både patienter och farmaceuter. Dom har bland annat utvecklat ett system för automatisk doshantering av läkemedel, med fokus på att öka patient säkerheten. Canella IT arbetar med den senaste tekniken för att vara så effektiva och nytänkande som möjligt. Exempelvis så ligger fokus framåt på att utvecklas inom Cloudifiering och arbete med AI. Du kan läsa mer om Canella
 **här.** 




  





**OM TJÄNSTEN** 




 Detta är en perfekt möjlighet för dig som vill utvecklas i rollen som utvecklare då du är med i hela utvecklingsprocessen, från projektledning och kravställning, till utveckling och test.
 



 I rollen som Java-utvecklare kan en vanlig vecka se ut som följande:
 


* Gå igenom aktiviteter i JIRA
* Utveckling utav parallella projekt samtidigt
* Kundkontakt
* Ta emot ärenden från test-teamet och hantera dessa
* Veckomöten där teamet går igenom projekten tillsammans



  





**DU ERBJUDS** 



* Att utvecklas till en fullstack-programmerare.
* Scala- och Java-programmering med bl.a. reaktiva ramverk.
* En platt organisation där du är med i hela processen
* Flexibla arbetstider och påverkan av tekniken
* Ett arbete där du gör nytta för samhället



  





**VI SÖKER DIG** 




 För att lyckas i denna roll så tror vi att du är/har:
 


* Har en bakgrund inom IT i form av studier eller arbetslivserfarenhet
* Har programmeringsvana
* Har kunskaper inom Java
* Har kunskap av Ansible
* Talar och skriver obehindrat på svenska och engelska då arbetsuppgifterna kräver det



**Det är också meriterande om du har:** 



* Kännedom om Scala
* Kunskaper i SQL
* Erfarenhet av Continuous Integration / GIT
* Kunskaper inom webbutveckling
* Intresse för läkemedelsbranschen
* Kunskaper inom Linux
* Intresse för Open Source



  





**MEN VIKTIGAST AV ALLT, SÅ TROR VI ATT DU ÄR:** 



* Självgående
* Flexibel
* Kommunikativ
* Nyfiken



  





 Låter detta som något för dig? Perfekt, vi ser framemot din ansökan!
 



  





**ÖVRIG INFORMATION** 




**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
 



**Plats:** 
 Stockholm, Vasastan, Hybrid
 



**Anställningsform:** 
 Det här är ett konsultuppdrag och anställning sker hos A-hub men möjlighet till anställning hos Canella efter 6 månader. Lön och förmåner diskuteras separat.
 



 Rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av A-Hub och kundens önskemål är att alla frågor rörande tjänsten hanteras av A-Hub.

title: Principal Engineer-Client Platform
description:
What you will do
   

  

* Own and evolve core parts of the Klarna client platform with a strong React Native focus, shaping foundational capabilities used across the app ecosystem.
* Solve complex, cross-cutting technical problems that impact developer experience, stability, scalability, and long-term maintainability of the platform.
* Lead large initiatives spanning JavaScript and TypeScript, frontend build tooling, native iOS and Android integrations, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Balance short-term delivery needs with long-term platform strategy, ensuring solutions are sustainable and aligned with the broader evolution of the Klarna app.
* Act as a technical multiplier by providing mentorship, conducting thoughtful code and architectural reviews, and guiding engineers toward high-quality platform standards.


 Who you are
   

  

* A React Native and frontend platform expert with strong platform thinking and a hands-on mentality.
* Deeply knowledgeable about React Native internals, including how it builds, runs, and integrates with iOS and Android.
* Highly proficient in JavaScript and TypeScript, with a strong understanding of runtime behavior and architecture patterns.
* Experienced with frontend build systems and tooling, including bundlers, transpilers, Babel, Metro, and Webpack concepts.
* Comfortable debugging complex runtime and build-time issues across the JavaScript to native boundary.
* Proven in evolving React Native at scale, including managing upgrades, shaping architecture, and improving tooling.
* Solid in basic AWS fundamentals such as compute, IAM, networking, monitoring, and database basics.
* Familiar with CI/CD pipelines and modern delivery practices.
* Knowledgeable in security and privacy fundamentals.
* Comfortable working with Node.js, Express, and database fundamentals.


 Awesome to have
   

  

* Principal-level problem-solving capability without requiring deep native-specialist expertise.
* Comfortable owning ambiguous, high-impact problems and driving them to resolution.
* Thinks in platforms rather than features, with a systems-oriented mindset.
* Pragmatic and delivery-focused, while remaining opinionated about long-term quality and architectural integrity.
* Actively mentors others, raises the technical bar across teams, and contributes as a collaborative, high-trust team player.

title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer - Energy Storage Systems
description:
Lyten is leading an industrial revolution through Lyten 3D Graphene™, a breakthrough supermaterial unlocking a new generation of products — from lithium–sulfur batteries and energy storage systems to concrete admixtures, lightweight composites, and next-generation sensors that are revolutionizing industries. Together, these innovations are making a massive global improvement and driving real-world impact across energy, mobility, construction, and defense.
   

  

 At Lyten, we believe the most meaningful careers begin with purpose — and with people who want to make a difference. We’re not just developing advanced supermaterials — we’re about to change the world as we know it, reshaping how energy is stored, how products are built, and how progress is made.
   

  

 We’re entering an exciting growth phase, scaling production across the U.S. and Europe and expanding our team of engineers, scientists, and innovators.
   

  

 Apply now to join our team and be part of something bigger than yourself — where collaboration, creativity, and purpose come together to build the technologies that will define the next century.
   

  

 At Lyten, we’re building the next generation of energy storage technologies that will power a safer, more sustainable future. As a
 **Senior Embedded Software Engineer** 
 , you will play a critical role in designing and delivering the core firmware that runs on our Battery Management Systems (BMS) software that directly impacts safety, performance, and reliability at scale.
   

  

 The role is available in both Gdańsk and Stockholm, where you will work at the intersection of hardware, systems, and data, collaborating closely with hardware engineers, system architects, and data scientists to transform complex requirements into robust, safety-critical embedded software.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Own the architecture, design, implementation, and verification of core BMS firmware.
* Develop high-reliability embedded software in C, compliant with functional-safety standards.
* Design firmware modules and interfaces for cell monitoring, balancing, SOC/SOH estimation, and protection algorithms.
* Optimize CPU, memory, and power usage to meet real-time constraints.
* Debug complex hardware-software interactions across MCU peripherals (ADC, SPI, I²C, UART, Ethernet).
* Drive software quality through unit testing, automated regression, code reviews, and static analysis (MISRA-C).
* Produce clear technical documentation: design specs, interface definitions, and release notes.


**What You Bring**
* 8+ years of embedded software development experience, including 4+ years in battery-related systems.
* Deep understanding of microcontroller architectures and real-time embedded systems.
* Proven experience implementing battery-management algorithms (cell balancing, SOC/SOH, protection).
* Expert-level C programming skills (MISRA-C:2004/2012 compliance is a strong plus).
* Hands-on experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and static analysis tools.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to debug complex, cross-disciplinary issues.
* A B.Sc. or M.Sc. in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related field.
* Fluent English, written and spoken.


**How You Succeed Here**
* You take full ownership — from concept through delivery — and care deeply about the impact of your work.
* You thrive in fast-paced, international environments and enjoy close collaboration across teams.
* You’re curious, pragmatic, and motivated by seeing your work used in real products by real customers.
* You value quality, flexibility, and continuous improvement, and you bring positive energy (and a sense of humor) to the team.


**Why Join Lyten**
* Be part of a company shaping the future of energy storage
* Play a pivotal role in expanding Lyten’s European presence


**Why Work at Lyten**
 At Lyten, you’ll be part of a team that’s redefining what’s possible in energy, materials, and manufacturing. We’re not just imagining the future — we’re building it today with breakthrough technologies that are changing how products are made and how industries innovate.
   

  

 Our people are the heart of that mission. From world-class scientists and engineers to creative problem-solvers in operations, manufacturing, and commercialization, every member of the Lyten team plays a role in turning bold ideas into real-world impact. We believe that the best work happens when you’re doing great things in the world — with people you like. Collaboration, curiosity, and a shared sense of purpose drive everything we do.
   

  

 What You’ll Find at Lyten
   

  

* A mission that matters: Contribute directly to solving complex challenges in energy, mobility, and materials innovation.
* Cutting-edge innovation: Work on technologies at the intersection of materials science, energy storage, and advanced manufacturing that strengthen energy security and local supply chains.
* Extraordinary people: Join a team of talented, friendly, and down-to-earth innovators who support, challenge, and inspire one another every day.
* Teamwork and culture: Experience a workplace built on trust, respect, and shared success — where collaboration fuels breakthroughs and everyone’s ideas are heard.
* Global impact: Help scale new materials and energy solutions that reinforce industrial resilience across the U.S. and Europe.
* Career growth: Be part of a fast-moving company entering a commercial growth phase, with opportunities to lead, learn, and make your mark.
* Purpose-driven values: Thrive in an environment that celebrates ingenuity, optimism, and meaningful progress — together.


 Lyten offers the opportunity to do the most important work of your career — helping build the technologies that will power the next century of innovation.
   

  

 Join us, and help transform industries, communities, and the planet with friends who share your drive to make a difference.

title: Cloud Engineers with Azure & Developer Experience
description:
We’re looking for two
 **Cloud Engineers** 
 who enjoy working in the space where developers and infrastructure meet. Here, you’ll spend your time automating the mundane, architecting the complex, and scaling the future of our Azure AI and OpenAI offerings. If you'd rather write a script than click a button, we want to talk to you!
   

  

 This is a code-centric role where infrastructure is treated as a software product. Everything you build is versioned, reviewed, tested, and continuously improved. Our goal is to reduce repetitive work and create the “Golden Paths” that let developers and AI teams deploy quickly, securely, and reliably.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Cloud Engineer, you’ll help build and grow our Azure-based platform. You’ll own the design, automation, and delivery of modular cloud infrastructure, ensuring it’s resilient, scalable, and easy for teams to use. Your work will reduce friction, remove unnecessary steps, and make it simple for developers and data teams to focus on building features instead of worrying about infrastructure.
 **What you’ll do:**
* Script first: Automation is at the heart of this role.  If it's worth doing twice, it's worth a pipeline. We treat our scripts like code: versioned, tested, and peer-reviewed.
* Architectural excellence: You’ll design and implement modular Azure infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Bicep), following the Azure Well-Architected Framework for reliability, performance, and cost.
* AI platform enablement: You provide the robust hosting, scaling, and governance for our Azure AI services. You ensure these high-demand services are resilient, secure, and optimized for our data science and dev teams.
* Developer multiplier: You build the CI/CD templates and connected tooling that abstract away platform complexity. You enable developers to self-serve compliant environments so they can focus on shipping features.


**We Are Looking For You Who Have**
* Expertise in PowerShell, Python, or Bash. We value maintainable code over quick-fix scripts
* Solid experience with Azure services, networking, and governance
* Experience architecting and automating Docker-based workloads and container orchestration (e.g., AKS, Container Apps) within a CI/CD lifecycle
* Fluency in English (written and spoken).


 You’ll be comfortable owning tasks end to end and making technical decisions independently within the areas listed above. Ideally, you have some years of hands-on experience with Azure, containers, and CI/CD pipelines, but we care more about what you can do and that you enjoy the field, rather than the exact number of years.
   

  

**It's Positive If You Have**
* Active Azure certifications such as AZ-400 (DevOps Engineer), AZ-305 (Solutions Architect), AZ-204 (Developer Associate), or AZ-104 (Administrator)
* Experience from regulated or security-conscious environments is a plus


 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values: we are wholehearted, we collaborate and we take the lead.
   

  

 Read more about NOBA Benefits here: https://careers.noba.bank/pages/information
   

  

**Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?**
 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Retail Network Developer
description:
Scania is undergoing a transformation from being a leading supplier of trucks, buses, and engines to providing complete and sustainable transport solutions. Together with TRATON and our sister brands MAN, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International, we are working to shape the future of mobility with innovative and environmentally conscious solutions. Our values – customer first, respect, team spirit, responsibility, and elimination of waste – are at the heart of everything we do. Together, we are at the forefront of creating a sustainable future.
   

  

**Role Summary**
**Shape the future of Scania’s global retail network**
 Do you want to combine data, digital tools, and strategic
   

  

 thinking to influence how Scania’s retail network develops worldwide? As a
 **Retail Network Developer** 
 , you will play a key role in helping our Business Units design efficient, future‑proof retail networks that deliver strong customer satisfaction and sustainable growth.
   

  

**Your mission**
 In this role, you support Scania Business Units across the globe in defining their retail network strategies. Through data‑driven analysis, digital tools, and close collaboration with local stakeholders, you help optimize workshop capacity, network performance, and customer experience.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
 As Retail Network Developer, you will work proactively with both strategy and execution:
   

  

  

* Drive global network planning Support Scania Business Units worldwide in developing their annual and long‑term (5‑year) retail network plans. You will guide, coach, and train local stakeholders throughout the planning process.
* Own and develop WebGis Act as the owner of WebGis, Scania’s GIS‑based network tool. You will:
* Monitor maintenance and updates
* Propose and drive tool enhancements
* Train Business Unit stakeholders to maximize value from WebGis
* Turn data into decisions Use network analysis and digital insights to support strategic decisions related to capacity, operations, and customer satisfaction


**Who You Are**
 You are comfortable working at the intersection of
 **IT, data, and business** 
 , and you enjoy collaborating across cultures and functions. You likely bring:
   

  

  

* An IT or analytical background, such as data analysis, GIS tools, or project management
* Experience in training, coaching, or stakeholder enablement
* Natural leadership skills, with the ability to influence without formal authority
* A structured mindset, combined with curiosity and a collaborative approach


**This Is Us**
 You will be part of the
 **Commercial Real Estate team** 
 , a diverse group of 11 specialists including Architects, Civil Engineers, Facility Maintenance Managers, Asset Managers, Business Controllers, and Sustainability Managers.
   

  

 Together, we:
   

  

  

* Support Scania Business Units with retail real estate and network development
* Monitor and optimize Scania’s global building portfolio
* Drive decarbonization of retail operations
* Shape the long‑term development of Scania’s retail network


 Close collaboration, knowledge sharing, and a strong team spirit are central to how we work.
   

  

**Scania Offers**
 We offer a dynamic, flexible workplace with hybrid work options, including Scania Sergel and Midway hubs. With a structured development plan and courses, Scania supports your career growth both locally and internationally.
   

  

 Benefits include training at our health center Gröndal or wellness allowance, result bonus, flexible hours, and company car leasing. Scania also hosts events for employees and their families, and Stockholm residents enjoy direct access to Södertälje via Scania Job express buses.
   

  

**Application**
 Your application should include a CV and any relevant certificates. We welcome all applicants and strive for diversity in our recruitment processes.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than 2026-03-15. Screening will take place on an ongoing basis during the application period. Logical and personality tests may be used as part of the selection process, and a background check may be required for this role.
   

  

 Yves Thepaut, Group Manager, yves.thepaut@scania.com
   

  

**We look forward to your application!**

title: Salesforce utvecklare
description:
Har du erfarenhet av Salesforce Core och ett brinnande intresse för utveckling? Vill du dessutom arbeta i ett engagerat projektteam som tillsammans tar fram nytänkande lösningar till kunder? Då kommer du att passa perfekt som Salesforce-utvecklare hos Releye.
   

  

****Såhär ser din vardag ut****
 Som Salesforce-utvecklare på Lightning-plattformen arbetar du med spännande kunder med höga ambitioner. Du kommer att arbeta hands on med olika lösningar och clouds vilket ger dig bred kunskap och erfarenhet. I Salesforce-projekten är du en nyckelperson som både designar tekniska lösningar och utvecklar lösningarna. I din roll som Salesforce utvecklare kommer du även att stötta affärskonsulter och projektledare samt andra utvecklare i teknisk rådgivning och ta fram tidsestimat för lösningar.
   

  

 Som senior Salesforce-utvecklare ansvarar du för att identifiera och lyfta fram eventuella risker eller utmaningar till kundteamet som kan innebära problem med leveransen. I en del projekt har du även ansvaret som Tech lead.
   

  

 Men du är inte ensam - vi jobbar som ett team och hjälper varandra.
   

  

****Vem vi letar efter****
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet inom relevanta roller, som exemepelvis utvecklare eller arkitekt
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av Salesforce Core - plattform och har även god förståelse för möjligheterna med standardkonfigurering.
+ Apex, Visualforce, Lightning Components, Flows
+ REST API, SOAP API och Salesforce API’s
+ Databasutveckling och SOQL

* Erfarenhet av integrationer mot ERP eller liknande
* Möjlighet att arbeta i Stockholm 2-3 dagar i veckan
* Poffesionell nivå av verbala och skriftliga kommunikationsfärdigheter på svenska och engelska


****Meriterande är även****
* Verbala och skriftliga kommunikationsfärdigheter på svenska
* Erfarenhet av implementationer i Experience eller Industry Clouds.
* Erfarenhet som integrationsarkitekt


****Utöver detta ser vi gärna att du har följande personliga egenskaper****
* Kommunikativ, kan anpassa ditt språk efter mottagare.
* Proaktiv, ser dina uppgifter utifrån ett större perspektiv och har förmåga att förbättra situationer genom att vara framåtblickande och planerande.
* Analytisk, löser problem utan att missa de långsiktiga strategierna, du ser logik och samband i komplex information eller miljö.
* Samarbetsorienterad, anpassar dig och hittar win-win-lösningar genom ett prestigelöst fokus på det gemensamma målet - i projektteamet och med kund.


 Vem vi letar efter
   

  

 Förmåner
   

  

* Kompetensutveckling - Mentorskapsprogram, R&D-day och uppmuntran till certifieringar, är några av fler aktiviteter som vi har kopplat till kompetensutveckling på Releye.
* Centralt kontor - Mitt i centrala Stockholm, på Kungsgatan, finns vårat kontor. Ett kontor vi delar med våra syskonbolag Attollo och Omeo. Här finns mängder av härliga lunchrestauranger och caféer att testa med kollegorna.
* Sociala happenings - After Works, fredagsfrukostar, team-aktiviteter och fester. Vi gillar att hitta på roliga saker tillsammans och tror på att blanda nytta med nöje.
* Tekniska utmaningar - Vårt intresse för IT skapar gemenskap och spännade utmaningar. Vi utvecklas ständigt genom att arbeta med den senaste tekniken inom Salesforce och Microsoft.
* Föräldrapenningtillägg - erbjuds till våra anställda


 Releye
   

  

 Releye är ett familjärt strategi- och IT-företag som Automatiserar, Digitaliserar och Transformerar kundprocesser, och ser till att de anpassas till den nya digitala världen. Vi är specialister inom Microsoft CRM och Salesforce och vi är stolta över att ha några av Sveriges mest kända varumärken som våra kunder. Tillsammans med våra kunder tar vi fram proaktiva kundupplevelser.
   

  

 Releye växer och behöver dig som värdesätter härliga kollegor, utmanande kundprojekt och en utvecklande arbetsplats. Vi har innovationsdagar, lösningar i absoluta framkant och ett skönt framåtlutat gäng som vill bli fler.
   

  

 Telefon: 0709446760 E-post: jobba@releye.se Plats: Kungsgatan 44, 111 35 Stockholm
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**För Mer Information, Vänligen Kontakta**
 Cecilia Landin
   

  

 HR Business Partner
   

  

 cecilia.landin@releye.se
   

  

 +46 (0)790 98 76 76

title: ServiceNow Developer
description:
Erfaren ServiceNow plattformsutvecklare med CSDM & CMDB-kompetens
 



  





 Vill du arbeta med en affärskritisk plattform som används av över
 **20 000 medarbetare** 
 ? Är du en erfaren ServiceNow-utvecklare som drivs av teknisk kvalitet, långsiktiga lösningar och att skapa verkligt värde för verksamheten? Då kan detta vara uppdraget för dig.
 



 Vi söker nu en
 **senior ServiceNow plattformsutvecklare** 
 som vill bli en del av ett engagerat och kompetent ServiceNow-team hos
 **vår kund** 
 . Här arbetar man tillsammans för att säkerställa plattformens övergripande hälsa, vidareutveckling och strategiska riktning.
 



 Plattformen är central för organisationens arbetssätt och teamets gemensamma mål är att skapa
 **enkla, värdeskapande och effektiva interaktioner** 
 för alla användare.
 



 Förvaltnings- och utvecklingsteamen är geografiskt spridda och organiserade utifrån produktområden, vilket innebär ett nära samarbete över team- och kompetensgränser.
 



  





 Om rollen
 



 Som ServiceNow plattformsutvecklare får du en nyckelroll i att vidareutveckla och förvalta plattformen med fokus på kvalitet, struktur och långsiktighet.
 



  





 Du kommer bland annat att:
 


* Skapa och förvalta
 **Business Rules, Client Scripts, Script Includes, ACL:er och integrationer**
* Utveckla, konfigurera och felsöka flöden i olika delar av plattformen
* Arbeta aktivt med
 **CMDB och CSDM**
* Analysera krav och omsätta dem till hållbara tekniska lösningar
* Delta i workshops och dialoger med verksamhet och kund
* Bidra i arkitekturdiskussioner med fokus på robust och skalbar design
* Arbeta med plattformens övergripande hälsa, integrationer, Employee Center samt Performance/Platform Analytics
* Stötta övriga förvaltningar inom ServiceNow-området



 Rollen innebär att du förväntas hantera komplexa frågeställningar och bidra med både teknisk spets och strategiskt tänkande.
 



  





 Din profil
 



 Vi söker dig som:
 


* Har relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* Har gedigen erfarenhet av utveckling i ServiceNow-plattformen
* Har starka kunskaper i
 **JavaScript**
* Har djup förståelse för
 **CSDM och CMDB**
* Har bred erfarenhet av integrationer
* Har erfarenhet av kravdialog och workshops med verksamhet/kund
* Har arbetat med förvaltning, felsökning och incidenthantering
* Har genomfört uppgraderingar av ServiceNow
* Har varit delaktig i implementation av ServiceNow eller någon av dess moduler



  





 Meriterande erfarenheter
 



 Det är extra meriterande om du även:
 


* Har erfarenhet av
 **On-prem / Self-hosted** 
 -miljöer
* Innehar certifieringar inom ServiceNow, exempelvis:
* Certified System Administrator (CSA)
* Certified Application Developer (CAD)
* Certified Implementation Specialist



  





 Personliga egenskaper
 



 Eftersom teamet arbetar agilt är det viktigt att du:
 


* Trivs i ett agilt arbetssätt
* Tar egna initiativ och driver ditt arbete framåt
* Är hjälpsam och serviceminded
* Har ett analytiskt och strukturerat arbetssätt
* Är tekniskt nyfiken och gillar att lösa komplexa problem
* Kan växla mellan detaljnivå och helhetsperspektiv



  





 Vi erbjuder
 


* Ett strategiskt viktigt uppdrag i en komplex och teknikintensiv miljö
* Möjlighet att påverka plattformens utveckling och arkitektur
* Ett kompetent och engagerat team
* En miljö där kvalitet, långsiktighet och innovation står i fokus

title: Fullstack utvecklare Telenor
description:
Är du en nyfiken fullstack-utvecklare som vill jobba i en teknikdriven miljö och göra skillnad för hundratusentals aktiva användare? Vimla är mobiloperatören, som genom att vara en fristående del av Telenor, kombinerar kraften från en stor organisation med friheten och flexibiliteten i ett litet team. Vi står för att ta kundfokus, enkelhet och schyssthet till en ny nivå på mobilmarknaden och i vårt team. Vi vill att det ska vara enkelt och roligt att vara kund så väl som medarbetare hos oss!
   

  

 Nu har du chansen att joina teamet i rollen som Senior fullstack utvecklare, ta chansen och sök!
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra**
 I rollen som Senior Fullstack utvecklare på Vimla kommer du in i en scale-up miljö där du tillsammans med ditt team arbetar i syfte att utveckla och underhålla Vimlas tekniska miljö. Ni står i centrum för att bygga de tekniska förutsättningarna för en helt digital mobiloperatör. Du arbetar tillsammans med ett tight team av utvecklare med passion för teknik och bra stämning. Teamet består av såväl juniora som mer seniora kollegor, vilket medför en kultur av lärande och kunskapsdelning.
   

  

 Inom ramen för rollen kommer du
   

  

* Bygga och optimera våra API:er
* Förbättra vår CI/CD-pipeline
* Utveckla nya tjänster i vår digitala plattform
* Jobba med skalbarhet i vår molnbaserade miljö


 Hos oss får du möjlighet att utmanas, utveckla din kompetens och arbeta med fantastiska och kompetenta kollegor. Om du gillar att ha en möjlighet att påverka vad du jobbar med, en bredd i dina arbetsuppgifter och jobba i ett tight DevOps-team - det här är platsen för dig!
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
 Vi ser att du har minst tre års tidigare erfarenheter av utveckling inom Typescript, node backends samt react för frontend. Du har fokus på leverans och säkerställer alltid god kvalitet i slutresultatet och tror att du tidigare har erfarenhet från att designa, bygga och underhålla distribuerade system i en molnbaserad miljö (tex AWS). Vi förutsätter att du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska.
   

  

 Tech-stack du jobbar med:
   

  

* Frontend: React, TypeScript, Redux, Jest, Playwright & React Native
* Backend: Node.js, API-utveckling
* Databas: PostgreSQL
* Arbetssätt: Agilt, DevOps, testdriven utveckling (TDD)


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Svelte
* Nginx, shell-scripting (Bash, Nushell)
* QA-arbete
* DevOps & Infrastruktur: Docker, Kubernetes/Docker Swarm, AWS, CI/CD med GitHub Actions


 På Vimla så värdesätter vi individer som är angelägna om att lära sig och utveckla sin egen kompetens. Vi förväntar oss inte att du känner till alla teknologier i vår stack, så vi letar främst efter någon med ett tillväxttänk och en vilja att lära sig!
   

  

**Varför du vill jobba på Vimla**
 Vimla är på en spännande tillväxtresa och möjligheterna att växa och utvecklas tillsammans med oss är enorma. Vi är ett roligt, tight team på runt 40 personer i en egen organisation som har stor frihet. Samtidigt är Vimla en del av Telenor Sverige och använder tryggheten som finns i ett stort bolag.
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar Vimla/Telenor med Experis IT, som har lång erfarenhet av att rekrytera IT-specialister och chefer.
   

  

 Om du har frågor eller vill ha mer information är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringskonsulterna Anki Snis på
 **anki.snis@se.experis.com** 
 , +46 70-377 59 69, och Carina Eyoma på
 **carina.eyoma@se.experis.com** 
 , +46 73-086 22 75.
   

  

 Urval sker löpande, så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Vi ser fram emot att ta del av din ansökan!
   

  

 I enlighet med Telenors policy genomför vi en bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidater i alla rekryteringar.
   

  

 Plats: Stockholm Råsunda

title: Skicklig senior .Net utvecklare
description:
Det går bra för oss! Vi söker dig med
 **flerårig** 
 erfarenhet av .NET utveckling.
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig med passion för systemutveckling och som gillar ny teknik. Vi jobbar med långsiktiga partnerskap med våra kunder och bygger ofta deras allra viktigaste system. Som utvecklare hos oss ingår du i tvärfunktionella kundteam som tar ansvar både för tekniken och för kunden. Det här ger dig stora möjligheter att ta ansvar och utvecklas. Tekniskt, men också mot andra roller på sikt om så önskas.
   

  

**Vi trivs att jobba tillsammans**
 Den vision vi strävar mot är att vara Sveriges mest eftertraktade team – både i betydelsen att kunderna vill anlita oss och att de bästa talangerna vill jobba hos oss. För det är teamet som är det allra viktigaste för oss, det är i team vi gör våra leveranser och formulerar våra råd till kunderna. Och det är i teamet vi delar kunskap, finner gemenskap och formulerar idéerna som lyfter oss alla.
   

  

**Du Har Detta i Din Kappsäck**
* mångårig arbetslivserfarenhet av systemutveckling inom Microsofts teknikstack (C#, .NET)
* Azurekompetens
* kunskap om SQL / har jobbat med relationsdatabaser
* vana att arbeta enligt agila metoder
* kan kommunicera på svenska i tal och skrift


**Extra Tyngd**
* Har jobbat med något front-end ramverk (t ex Vue, Angular, React) eller vill utvecklas mot full stack
* Gillar att ligga i framkant och driva teknisk förbättring - just nu pågår flera nyutvecklingsprojekt och större teknikskiften


**Vi Erbjuder Dig**
* Att tillsammans med andra bygga viktiga saker, som spelar roll
* Friskvårdsbidrag, kollektivavtal, tjänstepension och brett utbud av aktiviter
* Flexibel arbetstid och balans mellan arbete & fritid
* Stark kollegial anda i ekonomiskt stabilt företag


**Kontakt**
