title: Director, Enterprise AI Engineering
description:
**Introduction:**

  

AstraZeneca is seeking a Director, Enterprise AI Engineering with exceptional depth in modern AI. We require someone who understands how models work at a fundamental level, not just how to apply them, but why they behave the way they do, where they fail, and how to design something better. Someone whose knowledge of the field is deep enough to distinguish genuine advances from incremental work, and current enough to know where the boundaries are.

  

This person must also ship. We need a leader who translates that depth into production-grade AI systems at pace, leading a team of specialist engineers to solve, build, and deploy solutions on complex, high-impact problems. Research depth and engineering rigor in the same individual.


This is a hybrid role based in Gothenburg, you will lead a team of AI Engineers and serve as a member of the AI Engineering Leadership Team. Candidates will be assessed on both their technical and leadership abilities, as a portfolio delivery lead, and a practicing engineer who raises engineering standards and leads by example. You will collaborate with product, architecture, and platform teams, designers, and leaders to deliver production-grade AI services and assets.

  

Technical depth is equally critical to this role as leadership and delivery. We require someone who operates at the level of the mathematics, the algorithms, and the code — daily — while leading others to do the same.

  

Our AI Engineering team is a focused incubator of deep technical talent. We build high-impact, reusable, scalable, production-grade AI assets and incubated products across five thematic areas:

* Systems Intelligence — Systematically uncover, encode, and exploit what makes AstraZeneca unique
* Systems Optimization — Move AstraZeneca AI from predictive to prescriptive across all core areas of business operations and decision-making
* Applied Deep Learning — Deep learning expertise deployed on multi-modal, imaging, and foundational modelling initiatives
* Engineering Foundations — Cultivate and strengthen foundational engineering capabilities, cross-deployed and forward-deployed across the portfolio
* Product Incubation — Incubate and scale solutions prior to hand-off to enterprise product run teams
**Key****Responsibilities****:**

* Lead and develop AI Engineers with PhDs and significant industry backgrounds, setting and holding an exceptional technical standard
* Contribute hands-on to large, shared production codebases alongside your team
* Provide deep technical guidance on AI system design — architecture, training, evaluation, orchestration, and deployment — with demonstrable depth in one or more AI sub-domains
* Define and implement golden-path standards for AI product development, software engineering, and applied ML research
* Drive operational excellence in production ML systems: reliability, observability, failure handling, monitoring, incident response
* Maintain deep, current knowledge of the research landscape; critically evaluate and integrate methods with genuine production applicability
* Curate the strategic backlog as a Leadership Team member, focusing on highest-impact problems
* Partner with other engineering directors across the broader AI engineering landscape
* Translate customer and business demands into clear, actionable software requirements
 **Essential****Skills****/****Experience****:**

* Significant industry experience delivering production AI systems in large, complex organisations — able to raise the technical bar under real portfolio constraints and enterprise governance
* Deep expertise in the internals of modern AI systems; able to reason about model behaviour from first principles, not only empirically
* Demonstrable depth in at least one AI sub-domain (e.g., optimization, language, multi-modal, foundational models, agentic systems)
* Current grasp of the research landscape; able to critically assess and apply work from leading academic venues
* Experience designing and delivering multi-component AI systems and services
* BSc/MSc/PhD in Computer Science or related quantitative field
* Proven leadership of engineers with PhDs and significant industry backgrounds
* Active contributor to large-scale production codebases, shared libraries, or SDKs
* Advanced Python; familiarity database solutions (SQL, NoSQL, graph)
* Strong software engineering practice: architecture, CI/CD, unit testing, OOP, Git
* Algorithm design, optimisation, and scaling from first principles
* Cloud platform experience for ML development, API design, and deployment
* Able to engage senior business and technical stakeholders with equal credibility
* Experience in regulated or compliance-sensitive environments
 **What****We****Offer:**

* A high-impact AI engineering team solving consequential problems in healthcare
* A Leadership Team seat with real influence over strategic and technical direction
* Access to cutting-edge AI technologies and uniquely valuable data
* Professional growth in a company committed to turning ideas into life-changing medicines
* Competitive compensation and benefits

title: Data Scientist
description:
Join Publicis Intelligence – a dedicated team of specialists in data, technology, insights, and analytics!
  
At Publicis Intelligence, we are looking for a talented Data Scientist to become part of our team and help drive business results for our clients. As a Data Scientist, you will play a central role in leveraging data to uncover actionable insights and develop models that enhance our marketing campaigns. You will collaborate closely with client teams and other marketing experts to identify growth opportunities, optimize performance, and deliver measurable results.
  
  

**Responsibilities:**  

**Data Analysis:** Conduct in-depth analysis of large datasets to identify patterns, trends, and correlations relevant to marketing objectives.
  
**Model Development:** Build and deploy models and algorithms to forecast customer behavior, optimize campaign targeting, and measure marketing effectiveness.
  
**Testing and Evaluation:** Design and execute A/B testing and other experiments to continuously refine marketing strategies.
  
**Collaboration:** Work closely with all team members to translate business questions into data-driven solutions.
  
**Client Relations:** Build strong, trusted relationships with key clients.
  
**Stay Updated:** Stay current with the latest advancements in data science, machine learning, and marketing technology.
  
Qualifications
  
Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Marketing, or a related field.
  
Experience with cloud platforms (GCP and/or Azure).
  
Proficiency in data analysis tools and programming languages (e.g., SQL, Python, R). Knowledge of machine learning algorithms.
  
Understanding of statistical concepts.
  
Familiarity with digital media concepts and metrics.
  
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  
Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

title: Data Specialist
description:
At HMS Industrial Networks, we know our people are the key to our success. We take pride in nurturing a culture that’s inclusive, curious, and welcoming – where every employee is supported in growing both personally and professionally.


Are you passionate about turning data into insights that truly drive business decisions? We are now looking for a skilled and curious Data Specialist who thrives in a modern Microsoft cloud environment and wants to play a key role in shaping how we use data across the organization.


In this role, you will combine technical expertise with business understanding to create powerful, user-friendly reporting solutions that make a real impact.

**ABOUT THE ROLE**
------------------


As a Data Specialist, you will be responsible for developing high-quality reports and analytics solutions in a cloud-based Microsoft environment, primarily using Power BI and Microsoft Fabric.


You will work closely with stakeholders across the organization to understand business needs, translate them into data models and visualizations, and deliver clear, actionable insights that support smarter decision-making.


Your responsibilities will include:

* Designing and developing Power BI reports and dashboards
* Building and maintaining semantic models with well-structured relationships and star schema principles
* Creating frontend calculations using DAX
* Ensuring intuitive report layouts, navigation, and user interactions
* Analyzing business processes and translating logic into effective reporting solutions
* Performing ad-hoc data validation using SQL
* Contributing to the continuous development of our analytics capabilities and self-service reporting practices


You will be part of a collaborative and agile environment where iteration, feedback, and continuous improvement are key.

**ABOUT YOU**
-------------


We believe you are an analytical and solution-oriented professional with a strong passion for data and visualization. You combine technical skills with a solid understanding of business processes and enjoy transforming complex data into clear and meaningful insights.


To succeed in this role, you likely have:

* Hands-on experience developing reports in a cloud-based Microsoft environment (Power BI & Fabric)
* Strong DAX skills and experience building interactive dashboards
* A solid understanding of semantic models, relationships, and star schema design
* Experience translating business logic into structured reporting solutions
* Basic SQL skills for data validation and analysis


It is a plus if you have experience working with ERP or CRM data sources, especially Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations or Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement.


As a person, you:

* Communicate clearly and can explain analytical insights in an understandable way
* Collaborate well with cross-functional teams
* Are organized, self-driven, and take ownership of your deliverables
* Thrive in an agile and changing environment
* Enjoy sharing knowledge and contributing to a positive team culture


ABOUT US


HMS Networks make the World more connected, productive and sustainable. Our industrial communication products enable millions of machines such as robots, drives and air-conditioners to get connected to software and systems - a necessity to meet the future demands for energy efficiency and sustainability.


We are an innovative growth company based in Halmstad, Sweden with 1100 employees in more than 20 countries.


HMS is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an environment where everyone feels included, respected, and empowered.


Want to help us make the world more connected and sustainable? Visit hms-networks.com or look us up on social media.

**ABOUT THE APPLICATION**
-------------------------


Apply today and become part of a team that values your expertise, analytical mindset, and passion for turning data into meaningful business insights.


The selection process is ongoing, so we encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible.


If you have any questions about the recruitment process, please contact the responsible HR representative.
company_description: HMS is Moving Healthcare Forward

title: Senior Manager, Sales Engineering – VAS Issuing solutions
description:
**Company Description**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world. Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your community, and to the world.


Progress starts with you.

 **Job Description** **Overview**


We are seeking a Senior Sales Engineer who can bridge deep product knowledge with clear business outcomes for Visa’s Value-Added Services (VAS) across Europe. In this role, you will help banks, issuers, and fintechs understand how Visa’s Pismo platform fit into their architecture, design solutions that win enterprise trust, and collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Engineering to accelerate adoption of AI‑native, cloud‑native issuing and digital solutions.


As part of Visa, Pismo is redefining the future of issuing and core payments. Pismo’s technology enables financial institutions to move beyond legacy constraints and deliver modern digital experiences at scale. Moreover, it plays a critical role in the broader ecosystem—its cloud‑native, real‑time issuing and core processing platform serves as a backbone and enabler for numerous Visa Value‑Added Services.


A key part of the role will be solutioning complex, multi‑product deals that combine Pismo with other Visa services, delivering unified architectures that maximize client value. You will guide clients through these combined solution designs, shaping end‑to‑end modernization programs that are scalable, secure, and implementation‑ready. This role requires both strategic leadership and hands‑on engagement, driving architectural clarity, influencing senior stakeholders, and helping major European institutions transform their technology landscapes.

*This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.*

  

  

**Qualifications**  

* 8+ years of relevant work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 5 years of experience with an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD), or 2 years of work experience with a PhD, or 11+ years of relevant work experience.
* Experience in solutions architecture or technical sales engineering, ideally in payments, fintech, or high‑growth technology environments.
* Strong understanding of technical architectures, APIs, data flows, integrations, and cloud infrastructure.
* Consultative selling mindset: able to map Visa’s product capabilities to client pain points, regulatory needs, and measurable ROI.
* Skilled at simplifying complex technical concepts for both engineering teams and executive stakeholders.
* Builder mentality: creating reusable frameworks, demos, POCs, and scalable pre‑sales assets.
* Strong cross‑functional partner to Sales, Product, Engineering, and Delivery, maintaining tight feedback loops.
* Bonus: experience with AI platforms, developer tools, or enterprise integration patterns.
* Full fluency in an European Language and English

  

**Additional Information**  

Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Machine Learning Engineer - Deep Learning & Generative AI, Lund
description:
Job Title
Machine Learning Engineer - Deep Learning & Generative AI, Lund
Job Description*Do you want to work with cutting-edge technologies within video analytics together with highly skilled colleagues, at a world-leading company? Then this could be an opportunity for you!*  

  

What will you do?  

You will join our growing Core Technologies Server Analytics team, that is responsible for the foundation of Axis long term technology within video analytics. We deliver new core technology functionality to Axis future analytics applications and solutions.
The position is hands-on in a highly skilled team that values individual growth, teamwork, and great spirit. The team has a unique profile of technically strong and ambitious yet humble and supportive developers with a desire to achieve great results while maintaining an inspiring work atmosphere.
We work with state-of-the-art methods for video analytics algorithms and SW development within Deep Learning, including the latest advancements in Large Language Models (LLM), Multimodal models, and Agentic AI. You will interact with our development teams as well as with the receiving product and solution organizations.
The responsibilities of the role include enabling new product features and mastering complex problems, especially within the Deep Learning domain. In this role you will play a crucial role in the creation of analytics features, and you will be part of the thrilling development path until we launch new competitive products and solutions.  

  

Who are we looking for?  

We are looking for an experienced engineer with a strong interest in video analytics algorithms and software development within Deep Learning and modern AI systems.
We believe that you are a pragmatic and structured person with an open and curious mindset. You are communicative and enjoy teamwork. You probably have an engineering master’s degree in computer science, physics, mathematics engineering, or related field, along with several years of relevant work experience.
It’s a plus if you have experience with:* Software, architecture and system design for AI/ML systems
* Generative AI, including Large Language Models (LLMs), multimodal models and Agentic AI systems
* Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures and the integration of external knowledge sources into AI systems
* Designing, generating and curating datasets for training and fine-tuning generative, multimodal models
* Evaluation of generative and multimodal models, including defining metrics, benchmark and qualitative/quantitative evaluation methodologies
* Experience in computer vision & deep learning development and optimization.
* Proficiency in Python and taking solutions all the way from algorithms to a product-ready implementation
* Scalable ML systems, such as real-time streaming, distributed model training, deployment in complex scalable heterogeneous environments (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Leadership or mentoring roles


You will play a vital part of the Core Technologies Server Analytics team. Your main focus will be on Deep Learning and Generative AI at the research frontier, as well as developing production-ready high-quality algorithms for server and cloud systems. You will collaborate closely with teams across Core Technologies to shape end-to-end AI solutions.
As Axis values teamwork, it is important that you contribute with good spirit and welcome the different agile working methodologies used in our projects.  

What Axis has to offer  

We are a world leader in network video, where cutting-edge technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide. As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.*Our Lund HQ Campus, including the impressive Grenden building, offers a dynamic environment with spaces crafted to encourage collaboration, whether through informal “**fika**” chats, formal meetings,* *or after-hours activities.* *Check it out:* *Axis HQ*
Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, wellness allowance, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:  

Life at Axis blog  

Engineering at Axis blog  

Innovation at Axis
Ready to Act?  

Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications.
We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!
In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Magnus Svensson at phone +46 706 84 57 70.
Type of Employment
Permanent Employment
Posting End Date
2026-03-25*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* *Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
About Axis Communications
We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
With around 5000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
Let´s create a smarter, safer world
For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast
company_description: Axis Communications is a global growth company with currently are about 4000 employees worldwide and offices in over 50 countries. We are expanding. Visit our webb page axis.com

title: Receptionist Scandic Opalen
description:
Scandic Opalen ligger i Göteborgs roligaste kvarter, mitt emellan Ullevi och Scandinavium. Med nyrenoverade lokaler är vårt hotell perfekt för uppladdning eller eftersnack i samband med konserten, mässan, matchen eller biobesöket. Vårt attraktiva läge gör att vi välkomnar allt från den internationella affärsresenären till barnfamiljen som ska besöka Liseberg. Vi är ett stort team som arbetar tillsammans där vi lär av varandra, hjälper till där det behövs och uppmuntrar varandra till utveckling. Tillsammans stävar vi mot vårt gemensamma mål- att ge våra gäster service i världsklass. Då vi är ett stort hotell finns det även goda utvecklingsmöjligheter för den som önskar.


**Nu söker vi en Receptionist till Scandic Opalen.**



Oavsett varför gästen kommer till oss är det få saker som är så uppskattade som ett vänligt ansikte som hälsar välkommen. Du agerar värd tillsammans med övriga teamet på hotellet och skapar en gästupplevelse i världsklass.



Hos oss får du ta ett stort eget ansvar för att ta de beslut som krävs för att göra gästen nöjd och teamen utvecklar och förbättrar arbetssätt och service i takt med att omvärlden förändras. Vi är nämligen övertygade om att det är när du får utvecklas och bidra med all din kompetens och erfarenhet som vi överträffar gästens förväntningar. På köpet får vi kul på jobbet!



Så ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss – och bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic!


**Vad är innebär rollen?**



Du som arbetar i receptionen är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Ser till att gästens önskemål uppfylls. Du har alltid ett leende på läpparna och en kreativ lösning i bakfickan. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. Din arbetsplats är vår lobby. För det är där du möter flest gäster. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning.


Arbetet i receptionen innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet. Allt arbete sker med gästnöjdhet och försäljning i fokus.


Hotellet har öppet dygnet runt och det är därför viktigt att du trivs med att arbeta i skift (förmiddagar, eftermiddagar och helger).


**Vem är du?**



För att passa i rollen tror vi att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap.


Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.


Allra viktigast är dock dina personliga egenskaper och din inställning. För att passa i rollen behöver du vara en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.


**Information om tjänsten**



Tjänsten är en anställning med vikariat på deltid.


Vi tillämpar provanställning. Tjänsten omfattar dagar, kvällar och helger och tjänstgöringsgraden är 80% vikariat med chans till förlängning.


Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!



Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!


  
**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

Rabatt när du äter, dricker och övernattar hos oss


Family & Friends rabatt för din familj och vänner


Rabatt hos våra partnerföretag


Pension & försäkringar enligt kollektivavtal


Friskvårdsbidrag


Utbildning och utveckling via interna plattformar


  
Vi når längre när olikheter bejakas. Hos oss får du utrymme att vara dig själv och utvecklas i den riktning du vill, med trygga villkor och schyssta avtal som grund. Ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss - bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic.



Delar du våra värderingar?


**BE A PRO** **BE YOU** **BE CARING** **BE BOLD**

  

  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video


...uppmuntrar alla att göra skillnad för miljön och att det var en av våra kollegor inom housekeeping som kom på idén om ”häng-upp-handduken”.
...i Sverige blivit rankad som besöksnäringens mest attraktiva arbetsgivare två år i rad, i Visitas årliga undersökning.
... bara serverar kaffe som är ekologiskt och Fairtrade eller UTZ-certifierat.
...tack vare vårt stora miljöengagemang, blivit rankad som branschens mest hållbara arbetsgivare elva år i rad, av Sustainable Brand Index.
...under 2014 inledde ett samarbete med organisationen Real Stars, centrerat kring ”Fair Sex”, dvs. arbete mot människo- och sexhandel.

title: HSO International - Engagement Manager - Business Applications
description:
**Position:** Engagement Manager - Business Applications (regular travel required)


**Department:** Sales & Marketing


**Visa Sponsorship:** You must have legal working rights in the country of your residence within the EMEA region. Sponsorship is only available within the Netherlands.


**What is your goal?**



As an **International Engagement Manager**, you will drive new business development across Europe by leveraging customer insights, market trends, and the power of **Microsoft Business Applications**, including **Dynamics 365, Power Platform, and related cloud services**. You will help clients transform their operations through innovative solutions in **Customer Engagement, Field Service, Finance, and Supply Chain**.


**Leading Microsoft Partner**



HSO belongs to the elite Microsoft Dynamics Inner Circle for 21 years, within the top 1% of all Microsoft partners worldwide. With over 2,800 professionals, and a worldwide presence, we deliver successful implementations across industries globally.


**HSO International**



At HSO International, you'll join a diverse team of 300+ colleagues from 50+ nationalities, working on cross-border projects that make a global impact.



Learn more about Life at HSO International: https://www.hso.com/en/campaigns/life-at-hso-international/


**Key Responsibilities**


* Qualify leads and manage the full sales cycle - from initial contact to signed agreement - within a marketing-driven business development framework.
* Advise clients, present tailored solutions, craft proposals, negotiate terms, and ensure follow-through on commitments.
* Stay current on Microsoft Business Applications, licensing models, and HSO's service and support offerings.
* Focus on **new business acquisition** and **customer development**, particularly around Dynamics 365 and Power Platform.
* Travel approximately **5 days per month across Europe** to meet with clients and prospects.


**You Bring**


* Experience in consultative sales - locally or regionally - and are ready to expand your impact on a global scale.
* A strong interest in Microsoft Business Applications and their potential to drive business transformation.
* Analytical thinking, a self-starting attitude, and a collaborative mindset.
* Ability to engage with senior stakeholders (CCO, CEO, COO, CMO, Digital Directors).
* A desire to be challenged and coached, not directed.


**Your have**


* Bachelor's or Master's degree in business, technology, or a related field.
* Proven track record in new business development, ideally within Microsoft, SAP, or Salesforce ecosystems.
* Familiarity with **CRM, Field Service, Finance, Supply Chain**, and digital transformation topics.
* Fluent in **English** (spoken and written); additional languages are a plus.
* The ideal candidate for this role will be based in Denmark, Sweden or Finland. They are a citizen of an EU country and hold full **EU working rights**.


**Why should you choose HSO International?**


**Development and growth**



You get a job with plenty of career opportunities with a leading provider of innovative enterprise business solutions and distinct Microsoft Global Solution Integrator, who perceives your motivations, talents and ambitions.


**Fun and success**



You work in a collaborative and professional environment where success is built on teamwork and with colleagues who are ready to help each other.


**International project exposure**

Joining our team offers an exciting opportunity to engage in international projects, providing invaluable exposure to diverse cultures, markets, and perspectives. Through your involvement in these projects, you will broaden your global network, enhance your cross-cultural communication skills, and gain firsthand experience in navigating the complexities of international collaboration.


**Freedom and responsibility**



You have the freedom and flexibility to organize your workdays, but especially to shape your own career.


**Take the next step!**



Does the combination of business processes and Microsoft technology appeal to you? Take the next step in your career path with HSO International!

title: QA Automation Engineer
description:
**QA Automation Engineer**
--------------------------


Paligo is a fast-growing SaaS scale-up offering an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) trusted by global organizations. With 80+ people, 450+ customers across 38 countries, and a culture grounded in innovation, we’re on a mission to become the leading platform for structured content. This role is based in our Solna headquarters in Stockholm and reports to the Engineering Manager.

### **Role overview**


Paligo is looking for a **QA Automation Engineer** to play a central role in ensuring the quality and reliability of our products. At its core, this role is about quality control; it’s about designing the frameworks and strategies that allow us to scale with confidence.


This is a hands-on role where you will design, implement, and execute effective testing strategies. You won’t just follow a script, you will collaborate closely with Developers, Product Management, and stakeholders to define what quality looks like at Paligo. Whether you are building automated frameworks from scratch or performing manual deep-dives, you find energy in the "hunt" for hidden issues and the satisfaction of a seamless release.


The right person thrives in SaaS scale-ups, moves fast, and values high-fidelity collaboration. While we offer flexibility, the heart of our teamwork happens in our Solna office, where we emphasize in-person synergy to solve complex technical challenges.

### **Key responsibilities**

* **Strategy & Implementation:** Design and implement both manual and automated test strategies to secure quality throughout the entire development cycle.
* **Framework Development:** Build, enhance, and maintain automated testing frameworks from the ground up, with a heavy focus on end-to-end (E2E) testing.
* **Efficiency & Tooling:** Utilize modern testing tools (like Playwright) and methodologies to maximize test efficiency and coverage.
* **Cross-functional Collaboration:** Partner closely with developers and product managers to identify potential risks early and ensure high-quality, timely releases.
* **Bug Advocacy:** Identify, document, and track bugs to resolution, acting as the final gatekeeper for the user experience.
* **Continuous Improvement:** Evaluate internal QA processes and incorporate feedback to continuously sharpen our workflows and output performance.

### **What you bring**

**Must-haves**

* **The QA Mindset:** A curious, innovative, and detail-oriented approach. You have a knack for finding the "edge cases" others miss.
* **Experience:** 3+ years in software quality assurance within a software development environment (preferably B2B SaaS/Cloud).
* **Technical Proficiency:** Proven experience developing automated test frameworks and strong familiarity with general web technologies.
* **Tooling Expertise:** Deep knowledge of QA methodologies and tools like **Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium**.
* **Communication:** Native or professional fluency in English with the ability to collaborate across functions and cultures.
* **Agentic Development Familiarity:** A solid understanding of agentic development workflows, including experience (or strong interest) in how AI agents can be leveraged to assist in code generation, test maintenance, or autonomous bug discovery.

**Nice-to-haves**

* Working proficiency in Swedish.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and integrating automated testing into the deployment flow.

### **What you’ll focus on:**

* **E2E Automation Coverage:** Driving the expansion of end-to-end automated test coverage across both legacy features and new releases, ensuring critical user paths are consistently validated.
* **Stability:** Reduction in production incidents and bugs related to insufficient testing.
* **QA Cycle Efficiency:** Optimizing the speed and effectiveness of quality assurance within the sprint, ensuring that the testing phase accelerates rather than hinders the release of new features.
* **Process Evolution:** Tangible improvements in testing efficiency and the scaling of QA workflows.

### **Why join us**


At Paligo, you’ll be at the heart of a global company transitioning from startup to scale-up. Your work directly impacts how global enterprises manage their most mission-critical knowledge.

* **Impact:** Build a QA function from the ground up in a company leading its category.
* **Growth:** A dedicated Professional Development budget to keep you at the cutting edge of testing technology.
* **Culture:** A collaborative, hybrid work model in brand-new modern offices in Solna, grounded in ownership and curiosity.
* **Stability & Perks:** Competitive compensation, wellness allowances, parental leave contributions, and a healthy "fika" culture.

### **About Paligo**


Paligo was founded in 2015 and is an end-to-end Component Content Management System (CCMS) trusted by global organizations to create, manage, and deliver technical documentation and knowledge management content. With over 450 customers across 38 countries, our mission is to empower teams to turn knowledge into an asset anywhere and anytime.

Det gör vi genom en stark servicekultur och ett hotell i toppklass men den allra viktigaste biten är de som gör det otroliga arbetet för vi ska nå dit- våra medarbetare! title: Senior QA Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

For our client in the gaming industry, we're now looking for a technical tester who thrives in Unity environments and understands the nuances of mobile performance and 3rd party payments.

 **Key Responsibilities:**


- Develop and execute test strategies, plans, cases and procedures - track test coverage and gather valuable performance metrics  

* Plan, Assess and understand the architecture of the project to identify project weaknesses and ensure tests can cover those areas


- Communicate and collaborate with stakeholders, QA, developers, artists, Release Manager and others where opportunity exists and be a stakeholder where needed - raise risk and potential future issues and highlight technical challenges  

* Champion and enable developers to integrate more automated tests and quality practices where there is value in their respective projects and their game teams
* Organize and drive test automation improvement meetings with QA and developers.
* Assist in planning and setting requirements for automation tools and drive them
* Coach and help train other QA in specific tech areas such as API testing
 **Requirements:**

* Mobile Testing Experience (Android/iOS/Amazon).
* Experienced in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, C#, or Typescript.
* API Testing (Postman/Bruno), Load Testing and Performance Testing, OAuth
* Webstore and 3rd Party Payment experience
* Worked with account systems and logins
* Has Unity experience and understands project structure and inner workings
* Worked with automation tools such as Appium, AltTester, Selenium or similar
* Has experience understanding or working with CI systems such as Github Action, GCB or AWS experience
* Is comfortable working with Cloud Test Platforms or Device Farms
* Teaching and coaching skills
* Worked in development cycles and shipping
* English (full proficiency)

 **What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Marketing Automation & Content Manager
description:
**About the role**


We are looking for a strategic and hands-on Marketing Automation & Content Manager to help us scale our marketing engine and strengthen our product communication. This role combines product messaging, lifecycle marketing, and CRM automation into one high-impact position that directly supports revenue growth.


Reporting to the COO/CRO, you will play a central role in aligning marketing, sales, and product. You will translate product value into compelling content, build automated customer journeys in our CRM, and ensure consistent communication across digital channels.


This is a highly visible role with the opportunity to shape how we communicate with customers, nurture leads, and drive conversion across the full customer lifecycle.


The role can be based in either Gothenburg or Malmö and is offered as a hybrid remote position. The preferred start date is as soon as possible. The position is initially offered as a one-year contract with the possibility of extension.


The company language is English. Swedish is a strong advantage but not a requirement.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Product Marketing & Content**


You will be responsible for translating product capabilities into clear and compelling customer value.

* Create product materials such as one-pagers, presentations, and case studies
* Develop positioning and messaging
* Translate product features into customer benefits
* Maintain and improve sales enablement materials
* Collaborate with the webmaster to continuously improve the website

**Communication**


You will manage and develop our external communication and digital presence.

* Plan and publish social media content (LinkedIn, YouTube and other relevant platforms)
* Own and manage the content calendar
* Develop and write newsletters
* Create consistent campaign messaging across channels
* Support corporate communication initiatives
* Strengthen brand awareness through structured and consistent communication

**CRM & Marketing Automation**


You will play a key role in building and optimizing our marketing automation engine.

* Develop and execute targeted email campaigns
* Build and maintain automated customer journeys
* Segment audiences and manage contact databases
* Set up and optimize automation workflows
* Monitor campaign performance and improve results based on data
* Report on performance in relation to KPIs and ROI

**Required Skills and Experience**

**Strong Copywriting Skills**


You should be able to:

* Write clear and engaging emails
* Create compelling product messaging
* Adapt tone and style for different channels and audiences

**CRM & Marketing Automation Experience**


Hands-on experience with marketing automation tools is required, preferably:

* Zoho CRM
* Zoho Marketing Automation


You should be comfortable:

* Building workflows
* Creating lead scoring models
* Managing lists and segmentation
* Setting up automation logic

**Analytical Mindset**


You should be comfortable working with data and performance metrics.

* Experience working with dashboards and campaign reporting
* Understanding of key marketing metrics such as CTR, MQL and CAC
* Ability to continuously improve campaigns based on data insights

**Ideal Background**


We believe the right candidate:

* Has 3–5 years of experience in B2B marketing
* Has owned both content and marketing automation
* Understands customer journey mapping
* Is comfortable working in a fast-paced environment
* Can manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Has experience working closely with sales and product teams

**What We Offer**

* A central and highly visible role with real business impact
* A creative and collaborative working environment
* Opportunities for professional development and growth
* The chance to help shape the future of our marketing organization

**About Irisity AB**


At Irisity, we develop AI-powered video analytics software for the security industry with a strong commitment to personal integrity and privacy. Our technology focuses on detecting suspicious activity rather than identifying individuals.


Our system automatically detects unwanted activity such as intrusions at construction sites, people climbing onto restricted areas, or attempted break-ins. At sensitive installations such as schools, individuals are anonymized to ensure that privacy is fully protected.


By focusing on behavior rather than identity, we help reduce crime and increase safety without compromising personal privacy.


Irisity AB (publ) is a public company listed on Nasdaq First North, with headquarters in Gothenburg. We currently employ more than 70 people globally across development, sales, support, and finance.


Our R&D organization includes computer vision and machine learning specialists together with experienced system architects and software developers. Our solution is delivered as a cloud-based SaaS platform serving large international customers with thousands of connected cameras.


We are looking for skilled, curious, and motivated people who want to help shape the future of responsible AI-driven security technology.


As a global company, we value diverse and inclusive teams and believe different perspectives make us stronger.


We look forward to receiving your application.For integrity reasons, we do not accept applications submitted by email. Selection and interviews will be conducted continuously until the position is filled. For questions regarding the role, please contact COO/CRO Raziel Bareket at raziel.bareket@irisity.com.


Read more on www.irisity.com

title: Head of TechOps and IT
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
 The Role
   

  

 As our Head of Internal Technology and IT, you will architect and operationalise the AI-enabled infrastructure that powers Legora’s global scale. You will design and build the systems, automations, and processes that ensure we operate with precision, speed, and minimal overhead - creating an operational foundation that is robust, auditable, and built to scale seamlessly.
   

  

**Your mandate is simple:** 
 Build the most automated, AI-powered, operationally excellent organisation - empower our staff to do more with less.
   

  

 You will partner across Product, Engineering, GTM, and Legal to translate organisational complexity into elegant, scalable architectures and ensure that meaningful leverage comes from technology not people.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

 You will have direct ownership over how Legora operates and scales. The systems, automations, and processes you design will materially impact the business.
   

  

 In this role, you will operate as the end-to-end owner of our operational systems and AI-enabled workflows, responsible for:
   

  

* Leading complex, cross-functional operational initiatives across IT, Revenue Operations, Product Operations, Finance, and People
* Translating ambiguous business needs into structured requirements, implementation roadmaps, and measurable success metrics
* Designing, implementing, and owning AI-enabled systems and automations that replace manual workflows
* Building and maintaining the integrations that connect our operational stack end to end
* Identifying bottlenecks and eliminating them through tooling, automation, and smarter system design
* Establishing governance, documentation, and lifecycle standards to ensure durability and accountability
* Creating visibility through dashboards and KPI frameworks that drive disciplined decision-making
* Owning operational simplicity and leverage across the organisation


 You will define how a lean, AI-first company should operate - and ensure it actually happens.
   

  

 Who You Are
   

  

 You are an execution-focused systems builder with strong ownership and sound judgment. You don’t just improve processes - you take responsibility for making them work. You believe exceptional organisations stay lean by design - and you are ready to own the systems that make that possible.
   

  

**You Bring**
* 7–12+ years of experience in operations, systems management, solutions engineering, or process design in high-growth environments
* A proven track record of implementing software, building integrations, and automating workflows end to end
* Strong technical fluency and comfort designing scalable, event-driven architectures in the cloud
* Experience aligning technical and non-technical stakeholders around outcomes
* A structured, analytical mindset with a bias toward automation over coordination
* Comfort operating in dynamic environments where systems must be built, not inherited


 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 This is a foundational role. The systems and processes you build will determine how we scale - not by adding people, but by adding capability. You will help create an organisation where AI is embedded in every workflow, where operations run with speed and precision, and where a small, exceptional team can achieve what typically takes hundreds.
   

  

 If we succeed, it will be because we built one of the most automated, AI-native operational engines in the world - and you will have been the architect behind it.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Senior Solutions Engineer - Nordics
description:
Saviynt's AI-powered identity platform manages and governs human and non-human access to all of an organization's applications, data, and business processes. Customers trust Saviynt to safeguard their digital assets, drive operational efficiency, and reduce compliance costs. Built for the AI age, Saviynt is today helping organizations safely accelerate their deployment and usage of AI. Saviynt is recognized as the leader in identity security, with solutions that protect and empower the world’s leading brands, Fortune 500 companies and government institutions. For more information, please visit 
 

 www.saviynt.com
 

 .
 




  






 The Senior Solutions Engineer is a member of the Saviynt Sales organization,responsible for collaborating with the Sales Directors and Regional VPs to sell anintegrated suite of Access Governance and Cloud Security solutions to new and existingaccounts.  This individual will have a broad understanding of vendor solutions, industrybest practices, and technology integration, demonstrating expertise and delivery offunctional and technical solutions to sophisticated customer engagements.
 




  






 This individual will also provide expert knowledge to existing and prospective customers through conducting detailed technical discovery, responses to Request for Proposals(RFPs), and delivery of Proof of Concepts (POCs). Besides, this individual will be a contributor to Product Marketing collaborating in the development of white papers, solutions briefs, webinars, and blogs. The Senior Solutions Engineer will work proactively, and independently with various facets of the business ultimately driving opportunities to closure and possibility impacting revenue.
 




  






 The Senior Solutions Engineer will be expected to mentor/coach Solutions Engineers on strategy, influencing the customer, managing scope, and execution of technical presentations. This person must be located in Sweden and will work remotely + travel.
 





  




**WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING** 
* Develop and deliver technical presentations to demonstrate enterprise solutions, ease-of-configuration, simplicity of architecture, and intelligence of workflows providing the opportunity for customer interaction and demonstrating excellent presentation skills
* Effectively communicate solution value to the business and technical audiences that is clear and satisfies prospective customer requirements and/or inquiries
* Provide needs assessment, consultation, technical solutions, and customer support with a team of Saviynt professionals
* Collaborate with both the sales and global bid team members to respond to satisfy prospective customer inquiries resulting from an RFx
* Assist members of the global bid team and collaborate with members of the product management team in the curation of RFx responses
* Effectively communicate with sales directors and sales management, working proactively and independently to prioritize and manage top regional opportunities, driving them to closure
* Regularly provide solution feedback and competitive intel from the field to Saviynt product management, solutions strategy, and marketing teams
* Ramp and coach Solutions Engineers on solution demonstration, RFP responses and presentations, technical overviews, POC scope management, and execution
* Up to 60% international travel across Nordics



  




**WHAT YOU BRING** 
* Fluent in English and Swedish. Other Nordics languages are a plus (written/spoken)
* Domain expertise - Privilege Access Management,  Identity Governance and Administration, Application GRC, and/or, Cloud Security
* Minimum of five (5) years previous Solutions Engineering with demonstrable success in Cloud Security, Privileged Access Management, Application GRC, and/or Identity Governance and Administration solutions
* Bachelor's degree in information systems or related area, or demonstration of equivalent knowledge such as technical certifications from ISACA, (ISC)², AWS Cloud Practitioner, Microsoft Azure Fundamentals, Google Cloud Security Engineer, etc
* Ability to travel up to 60% across Nordics
* Superior communication, relationship and customer service skills that result in the ability to rapidly assess needs and sell solutions to sophisticated customers
* Ownership and management of technical team relationships within existing and prospective opportunities
* Self-sufficient with a high degree of autonomy and a passion for working within a dynamic startup-like environment
* Exemplary technical skills enabling configuration and rapid problem solving in the field including:
* Experience in Identity Governance and Administration domain with firm grasp of its concepts such as Identity Life Cycle Management, Entitlements Management, Access Request, Workflow, Policy and Role Management, Access Certification, Audit, Reporting/Analytics, and Deployment Scenarios
* Database query experience in a relational database environment (MySQL and Elastic Search)
* Experience with REST API, PowerShell, and GraphAPI
* Knowledge of authentication and authorization protocols and standards including SAML, OAuth/2, SCIM, OpenID, WS-Trust, SPNEGO, x.509, SPML, Kerberos, REST, JSON, and others that facilitate Single Sign On (SSO), ID federation, etc
* Understanding of data governance concepts and compliance regulations such as GDPR & CCPA
* Experience with regulatory compliance and security frameworks such as SOX, NERC-CIP, HIPAA, Cobit, Center for Internet Security (CIS), Cloud Security Alliance, NIST, PCI, etc
* Experience with AzureAD, Okta, JumpCloud, OneLogin, PingDirectory, Active Directory, eDirectory, Oracle Internet Directory, Radiant Logic, and other Cloud/LDAP/Virtual directories
* Basic understanding of networking technologies such as HTTP, TCP/IP, firewalls, and encryption
* Exemplary communication and relationship skills (verbal, written and presentations)
* Strong business and technical document creation skills (e.g. scope definition, proposals, architecture and network diagrams, etc.)






  




  


**If required for this role, you will:** 




 - Complete security & privacy literacy and awareness training during onboarding and annually thereafter
 



 - Review (initially and annually thereafter), understand, and adhere to Information Security/Privacy Policies and Procedures such as (but not limited to):
 



  





 > Data Classification, Retention & Handling Policy
 



 > Incident Response Policy/Procedures
 



 > Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery Policy/Procedures
 



 > Mobile Device Policy
 



 > Account Management Policy
 



 > Access Control Policy
 



 > Personnel Security Policy
 



 > Privacy Policy
 



  






 Saviynt is an amazing place to work. We are a high-growth, Platform as a Service company focused on Identity Authority to power and protect the world at work. You will experience tremendous growth and learning opportunities through challenging yet rewarding work which directly impacts our customers, all within a welcoming and positive work environment. If you're resilient and enjoy working in a dynamic environment you belong with us!
 




  





***Saviynt is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome everyone to our team.  All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.***

title: Remote Assistant Administrator
description:
Our organization is seeking a Remote Front Desk Coordinator to manage visitor experiences, coordinate communications, and support operations for our distributed workforce. This remote position adapts traditional reception responsibilities for virtual environment. 
 



 Primary Duties: 
 



 Serve as central communication hub for internal and external inquiries, manage virtual reception services including call answering and message distribution, coordinate visitor registration processes for office locations, schedule and confirm appointments across multiple time zones, maintain reception coverage ensuring availability during business hours, greet and direct video conference participants, provide administrative support including document preparation and data entry, process mail and package notifications, coordinate with facility management for physical office needs, support event planning and logistics, maintain organized records of communications and visits, handle confidential information with discretion, troubleshoot basic technical issues for virtual meetings, contribute to positive organizational culture through friendly interactions, and adapt to evolving needs of hybrid work environment. Your coordination skills will ensure smooth operations across virtual and physical touchpoints. 
 



 Qualifications: 
 



 High school diploma or equivalent with additional administrative training preferred, minimum one year reception or customer service experience, strong organizational and multitasking capabilities, excellent interpersonal and communication skills, professional presentation in voice and video interactions, technological adaptability for various platforms, problem-solving mindset, flexibility for occasional schedule adjustments, detail-oriented approach, and team player attitude. Experience in hybrid or remote operations is beneficial. 
 



 Work Setup: 
 



 Remote position with defined schedule typically aligned with business hours in primary time zone. You'll use cloud-based phone systems, video platforms, scheduling software, and collaboration tools to perform duties. Occasional video presence for meetings requires professional appearance and background. Consistent, reliable availability is essential for reception coverage. 
 



 Career Development: 
 



 This role provides foundation for career growth in operations, project coordination, executive assistance, or office management. You'll gain exposure to organizational operations, stakeholder management, and business processes while developing professional skills. High performers advance to senior coordinator or specialist positions. 
 



 front desk coordinator, reception services, communication hub, visitor coordination, appointment management, time zone scheduling, virtual reception, administrative support, event logistics, facility coordination, hybrid operations, call management, professional greeting, organizational skills, stakeholder relations, operations support, career foundation, coordinator advancement, business exposure, professional development

title: Veeva Commercial Cloud Manager
description:
**Company Description**
***Statistics show that women and underrepresented groups tend to apply to jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Sobi encourages you to change that statistic and apply. Rarely do candidates meet 100% of the qualifications. We look forward to your application!***
 At Sobi, the work we do every day redefines the standards of care and transform the lives of people living with rare diseases.
   

  

 As a diverse team of entrepreneurial people, we are passionate about our growth journey towards becoming a global leader, making a difference for rare disease patients, moving quickly and always challenging the status quo.
   

  

 We are committed to an inclusive, sustainable and flexible workplace that fosters growth and development.
   

  

**Job Description**
**About the role**
 To support our global Commercial and Medical organizations, we are looking for an experienced Veeva Commercial Cloud Manager to develop and enhance our Veeva Vault CRM platform within a fast growing, highly regulated pharmaceutical environment.
   

  

 Our IS/IT is managed in-house and acts as a strategic enabler for implementing, developing, and supporting business-critical systems across the organization. In this role, you will be responsible for solutions that support our global Commercial and Medical teams, working in close collaboration with stakeholders across affiliates, headquarters functions, and external partners.
   

  

 This is a hands-on, global role combining system administration, configuration, solution design, and platform evolution within the Veeva Commercial Cloud ecosystem.
   

  

 The position is part of a European team, with flexibility for remote work within the European time zone, reporting to the Head of Digital Commercial based in Stockholm.
   

  

**Your impact will include**
* Act as the global System Administrator for the Veeva Vault CRM platform
* Configure and evolve core Vault CRM modules (e.g. Account Management, Call Reporting, CLM, Events Management, Campaign Manager, Approved Email, Surveys, Medical Inquiry, Cycle Plans, Event Meetings)
* Translate complex business needs into scalable, compliant system solutions
* Manage roles, permissions, security, and data governance
* Provide operational support, troubleshooting, and user enablement
* Develop and maintain technical documentation, configuration records, and training materials
* Lead integrations with downstream data platforms and external digital ecosystems
* Collaborate with Commercial, Medical Affairs, Compliance, Regulatory, and Data teams to streamline processes and improve field efficiency
* Identify and implement innovative solutions—including generative AI and predictive analytics—to enhance HCP engagement and field productivity.
* Partner with Data Science teams on proof-of-concept initiatives such as AI-powered call note summarization, smart segmentation, and next-best-action recommendations.


**Qualifications**
**About you**
 You are an experienced, solution-oriented professional who enjoys owning complex platforms and improving how technology supports commercial strategy. You combine technical depth with a collaborative mindset and are comfortable operating in a global, regulated environment. You are curious, proactive, and motivated by making a real impact—both for business and for patients living with rare diseases. You enjoy owning complex platforms and improving how technology supports commercial strategy. You combine technical depth with a collaborative mindset and are comfortable operating in a global, regulated environment.
   

  

**Essential Experience**
* Minimum 3 years of hands‑on experience with Veeva CRM (Vault CRM is highly desirable)
* Strong expertise in system configuration, administration, and governance
* Proven ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions
* Experience with user management, security configuration, and compliance‑driven environments
* Familiarity with Veeva Network, Open Data, Events Management and Veeva PromoMats (CLM and VAE management) is an advantage
* Veeva CRM or Vault CRM Administrator/Developer certification preferred
* Experience working in life sciences (pharma, biotech, or medical devices)
* Strong communication skills with the ability to engage both technical and business stakeholders.
* Excellent communication skills in English, working confidently with global stakeholders


 Here at Sobi we live by our core values: Care, Ambition, Urgency, Ownership and Partnership!
   

  

**Additional Information**
**How to apply**
 We have an ongoing selection process in this recruitment and ask you to send your application as soon as possible. Click apply and include your resume in English.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
 Here At Sobi, Our Mission And Culture Get Us Excited To Come To Work Every Day, But Here Are a Few More Reasons To Join Our Team
   

  

* Emphasis on work/life balance
* Collaborative and team-oriented environment
* Opportunities for professional growth
* Diversity and Inclusion
* Competitive compensation for your work
* Making a positive impact to help ultra-rare disease patients who are in need of life saving treatments


 We are a global company with over 1,900 employees in more than 30 countries and are committed to the societies where we operate. With a deeply skilled management team directing our day-to-day wins, and a Board with a stellar track record, we’re ready to take on the world’s diseases, ailments and adversity. Our people believe they have the power to make a positive impact in others’ lives because that’s exactly what we do here. If you’re seeking a career that taps into your talents in a way that makes the world a better, healthier place, we just may have a job for you.
   

  

 We know our employees are our most valuable asset, and our culture conveys that. We offer a competitive benefits package, to support the health and happiness of our staff.
   

  

**Sobi Culture**
 At Sobi, we refuse to accept the status quo. This is because we have witnessed first-hand the challenges facing those affected by rare diseases and have used this knowledge to shape our business to find new ways of helping them.
   

  

 As a specialized biopharmaceutical company, we are dedicated to rare diseases. And we see this focus as a strength. By effectively turning our research into ground-breaking treatments, we help make medicine more accessible and open up more possibilities for patients and more opportunities for those caring for them. This has been our approach since day one, but we know we can’t change the world of rare diseases on our own. Accomplishing this requires strong partnerships with patients, partners and stakeholders across the entire value chain. Together, we define how our business can create solutions that serve the needs of those affected by rare diseases while facilitating sustainable growth.

title: Salesperson
description:
**OneLab söker SDR** 




  





 🚀 Vill du jobba med försäljning som faktiskt betyder något?
 



  





 Det här handlar om
 **impact** 
 .
 



**OneLab söker nu i samarbete med Graftus-appen** 
 en
 **Mötesbokare / Sales Development Representative (SDR)** 
 till ett snabbväxande
 **SaaS-bolag inom health tech** 
 som hjälper tiotusentals anställda och hundratals företag att upptäcka hälsorisker i tid – och agera på dem.
 



 Det här är rollen för dig som vill
 **in i tech** 
 ,
 **lära dig modern B2B-försäljning** 
 och jobba med något som gör verklig skillnad.
 



  





 🔥 Vad du faktiskt kommer göra
 



 Du är
 **första kontakten** 
 mellan OneLab och framtida kunder.
 



 Det innebär att du:
 


* Tar första dialogen med företag via telefon, mejl och LinkedIn
* Väcker nyfikenhet hos beslutsfattare som HR-chefer, VD och CFO
* Bokar möten som leder till affärer
* Jobbar tätt med ett erfaret säljteam
* Lär dig hur professionell SaaS-försäljning fungerar i praktiken



 Kort sagt: du bygger grunden till affären.
 



  





 👀 Vem passar den här rollen för?
 



 Har du viljan är denna roll för dig!
 



 Vi tror att du:
 


* Gillar att prata med människor och skapa kontakt
* Har driv, uthållighet och gillar tydliga mål
* Har någon form av erfarenhet av försäljning, kundkontakt eller mötesbokning (men det är inget krav)

 Personlighet och inställning slår CV.
 



  





 💥 Vad du får
 


* En stark ingång till
 **SaaS, B2B och tech-försäljning**
* Gedigen onboarding och kontinuerlig coaching
* Ett ambitiöst team med högt tempo och höga ambitioner

 🙌 Låter det här som du?
 



 Toppen.
 



 Sök enkelt via
 **Graftus-appen** 
 – vi är mer nyfikna på
 **vem du är** 
 än hur ditt CV ser ut.
 



**OneLab × Graftus – när rätt människor hittar rätt möjligheter.**

title: Senior / Lead Data Scientist - 1 year contract
description:
**Lead Data Scientist (6-12 Month Contract, Extendable)** 

  





 Hybrid - Stockholm onsite needed 20%
 



  





  




**ROLE OVERVIEW** 

  





 We are seeking an experienced Lead Data Scientist to join our client’s team on a full time basis. You will play a key role in leading, designing, building, and maintaining scalable data science solutions that support advanced analytics, business intelligence, and machine learning use cases.
 



  





 You will act as a technical lead, driving best practices, mentoring team members, and ensuring the successful delivery of high-impact data initiatives.
 



  





  





  




**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 

  





 8+ Years as a Data Scientist
 



  





 • Lead the design, development, and deployment of machine learning models and advanced analytical solutions.
 



 • Translate business requirements into data science strategies and actionable insights.
 



 • Perform and oversee exploratory data analysis (EDA) and feature engineering on large datasets.
 



 • Build, validate, and optimise predictive and statistical models at scale.
 



 • Collaborate with data engineers to ensure scalable data pipelines for model deployment.
 



 • Implement model monitoring, evaluation, and performance tracking frameworks.
 



 • Communicate findings clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
 



 • Support productionisation of models and integration into business systems.
 



 • Mentor and guide junior data scientists within the team.
 



  




**WHAT WILL MAKE US HAPPY 🤩** 

  




* Proven experience as a Data Scientist (8+ Years) in large-scale organisations.
* Strong programming skills in Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, etc.).
* Solid experience with SQL / Postgres.
* Hands-on experience with ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, XGBoost).
* Strong understanding of statistical modelling and experimental design.
* Experience deploying models in cloud environments (AWS / Azure).
* Familiarity with MLOps concepts and model lifecycle management.
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management capabilities.
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a remote setup.
* Excellent communication skills in English (written & spoken).



  




**NICE TO HAVE** 

  




* Experience with deep learning or NLP
* Familiarity with MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, etc.)
* Knowledge of data governance, GDPR compliance, and security best practices
* Experience working in cross-functional agile environments



  




**BENEFITS** 

  




* Full Time contract with a leading EU client
* Fully remote work, some onsite required in Stockholm from time to time
* Long-term engagement with opportunities to expand responsibilities.
* Collaborative and innovative international team environment.

title: Head of Customer Success
description:
**Oneflow is a rapidly growing tech scale-up located in the heart of Stockholm. We have created a platform that automates the entire contract process from start to finish, all in one place. Turning clunky, static contracts into customer-oriented, digital contracts that feel like magic.** 




  





**Who you are** 




  





 You’re a commercially minded Customer Success leader with experience guiding teams across multiple markets. You know how to lead through team leads, balancing strategic direction with a hands-on understanding of the day-to-day realities of Customer Success.
 



  





 You thrive in an international environment and have worked with customers of varying sizes and complexity, including enterprise-level organizations. You understand how Customer Success, Sales, Marketing, Partnerships, and RevOps work together across the customer lifecycle—and you actively collaborate across functions to drive retention, expansion, and long-term customer value.
 



  





 You’re neither a purely top-down executive nor just an operational individual contributor. Instead, you shine in the space in between: close enough to the details to make smart decisions, and senior enough to set direction, drive change, and develop leaders.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Lead and develop the Customer Success organization across multiple markets through team leads, ensuring strong performance, alignment, and continuous growth
* Own and drive key Customer Success outcomes such as retention, net revenue retention, customer satisfaction, and long-term customer value
* Partner closely with Sales, Marketing, Partnerships, and RevOps to optimize the end-to-end customer lifecycle, including handovers, renewals, and expansion
* Build and evolve scalable Customer Success processes, structures, and ways of working that support both local markets and global customers
* Act as a senior point of escalation and engagement for strategic and enterprise customers, while staying close enough to the operation to drive meaningful change



  





**Skills and requirements** 




  




* 7+ years of experience in Customer Success, Account Management, or a similar commercial role within SaaS or technology-driven companies
* Proven experience leading and developing managers or team leads, preferably in a multi-market or international setup
* Strong commercial acumen with experience managing enterprise customers and complex, multi-stakeholder organizations
* Demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with Sales, Marketing, Partnerships, and RevOps to drive retention and expansion
* A hands-on, change-oriented mindset with the ability to combine operational understanding with strategic leadership



  





**Why you’ll love working at Oneflow:** 




  




* Fast-growing tech scale-up with a fantastic culture (eNPS above industry average)
* Work in a team with clear goals and a shared vision
* Wellness allowance, insurance, and pension plan included
* Modern office and fun team activities to keep you connected
* Collaborate with inspiring colleagues in an open, inclusive environment



  





**Come work with us** 




  





 We value gender equality and diversity in organisation, so we strive for a team that reflects the diversity in today's society. At Oneflow we currently have 34 nationalities and are proud of an extremely diverse workplace. Our recruitment is based on competence.
 



  





 The recruitment process begins with an interview with Aleksandra from Talent Acquisition. Next, you will complete a personality and logic test, followed by an interview with the hiring manager, an assignment, and participation in a case interview.
 



  





**We can’t wait to meet you! 🎉** 




  





 Visit our website for more information about our product and Oneflow. Visit our career page for more information about our culture and future colleagues. 💜
 



  





**One more thing before you hit “Apply”** 




  





 We really want to get to know you and not the AI version of you. No need to overthink it or try to sound a certain way. We care more about your thoughts and who you are. Speak from the heart and we’re listening!💫

title: Solution Architect
description:
Dedicated to powering entrepreneurs, Qred is a profitable, fast-growing fintech bank. In just 10 years, we’ve hit 1 billion SEK in revenue and helped create 10,000+ jobs every year. We combine smart tech with real-world experience to make funding simple, fast, and fair. With a flat organization and bold growth plans, we’re now looking for a
 **Solution Architect** 
 to join our next chapter.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Solution Architect at Qred, you’ll be a part of a growing tech organization, supporting our cross-functional teams in our
 **Revenue Domain** 
 and ensuring they can deliver in the best possible way. You will both advise & collaborate with teams on solutions in their discovery phase and own problems yourself, from planning to implementation. Your daily work will probably include the following:
   

  

* Supporting product teams in the Revenue Domain in their ability to build cloud-distributed systems, serverless architectures and container platforms.
* Working with internal and external stakeholders to identify the company's needs and requirements and translate them into technical solutions
* Working across teams on solutions that involve multiple teams and ensuring the solutions we build are in line with our technical vision
* Getting ownership of problems to solve regarding products, architecture, and way of working impacting multiple product teams.
* Participating in setting our technical roadmap to align with business goals and the problems we see in our organization & architecture
* Designing and implementing scalable, reliable, and secure solutions


**Who are we looking for:**
* At least 5 years of hands-on experience in development with NodeJS/TypeScript or Java
* Experience with cloud infrastructure (we use AWS)
* Good grasp of security and compliance standards.
* Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as AWS CloudWatch, Grafana or ELK Stack.
* Great communication skills, with the ability to present complex concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. You’re self-driven and thrive on autonomy.


**Why join us?**
